name: =?utf-8?Q?Will=20Douglas=20for=20Texas=20House?=
subject: Campaign Update
body:
the Republican State Leadership Committee spotlighted me as a top national leader! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/willdouglasfortexas/campaign-update-may-4-2020?e=4f010155df)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=f79488c0b6&e=4f010155df)
---
| | Friends,

It's been a busy couple weeks for our campaign!

I've kept active with my pharmacies and dropping off donations of hand sanitizer to police & fire departments around the district.

And the [Republican State Leadership Committee spotlighted me as a top national leader!](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=523e49f529&e=4f010155df)

I also want to thank all of you who have stepped up and [donated](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=ec14e5dff2&e=4f010155df) to our campaign during this difficult time for our state and nation. Your support is crucial to ensure we can beat the Democrats in November.

I hope you and your families are staying safe and healthy.

See below for a quick recap of what we've been up to...
---
|
---
|
---
On Friday our campaign for Texas' 113th State House District was named to the May 2020 'Candidate Spotlight' series by the Republican State Leadership Committee! I'm honored to have earned this recognition. It's a testament to the hard work everyone on our team has put in since we launched our campaign in October.
|
---
| [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=48a6359e6c&e=4f010155df)
---
Huge shoutout to Southern Glazer's Wine & Spirits for their donation from two weeks ago of 25 gallons (👀) of Everclear! We turned it into over 1,000 bottles of hand sanitizer for first responders. [Please click through to watch the short video.]
|
---
|
---
Unfortunately we can't knock on doors but at least I can make some phone calls!
|
---
| _**#RPTServes**_ Last week was #RPTServes Volunteer Week. This coordinated service week highlighted the Republican Party of Texas' ongoing effort encouraging every Republican in Texas to come together and serve their neighbors to make a tremendous impact across the state. I was proud to donate hand sanitizer to folks doing amazing work across the district -- from a hospice to police departments and fire stations.
---
|
---
---
|
---
| _**News Updates on COVID-19**_
* **Global:**[Total](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=e3b3c86f70&e=4f010155df) confirmed cases as of 5:30pm: 3,573,864 \-- Total deaths: 250,687.
* **U.S.:** [Total](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=25379b01ef&e=4f010155df) confirmed cases as of 5:30pm: 1,177,784 \-- Total deaths: 68,442.
* **Texas** : [Total](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=7335234a2d&e=4f010155df) confirmed cases as of 5:30pm: 32,332 \-- Total deaths: 884.
* **Federal government update:** The U.S. Treasury will need to [borrow a record $2.99 trillion](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=0c47fe568f&e=4f010155df) this quarter to pay for coronavirus relief efforts.
* **Texas government update:** Governor Greg Abbott is [expected](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=aeb949048c&e=4f010155df)[ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=4e5c48c599&e=4f010155df)[to announce an update](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=d1ed722845&e=4f010155df) to Texas’ response to COVID-19 Tuesday afternoon. Previously, Abbott announced phases in reopening the state in the wake of the coronavirus pandemic after letting his stay-at-home executive order expire last Thursday.

---
|
---
| _**Volunteer from Home**_
---
| Now you can volunteer for the Will Douglas for State House campaign from the comfort of your own home! We're seeking volunteers to help us make phone calls throughout the district, letting folks know about our campaign. If you'd like to volunteer, please call or text Trevor Naglieri at 508-826-5135.
---
|
---
| _**Join Team Will Douglas**_
---
| I'm a self-made pharmacy owner running for office to ensure the next generation of Texans can live in a state where the economy is strong and our communities are safe. This district has been ranked the top Republican take back opportunity in the state, which means every dollar we raise moves the needle toward returning HD-113 to Republicans. [Click here to donate](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=ae3b623b38&e=4f010155df) directly to our campaign. Then follow us on Facebook and Twitter at the links below, and like and share our content!
---
| For Texas,
Will Douglas
Republican Nominee for TX-HD-113
---
|
---
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=68f2490802&e=4f010155df "CONTRIBUTE")
---
| | | | | | | [](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=3d26cdb81e&e=4f010155df)
---
| | [](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=82d6a1cd23&e=4f010155df)
---
| | [](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=2ffa23c4af&e=4f010155df)
---
|
---

You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Will Douglas for TexasPO Box 496955Garland, TX 75049-6955
[Add us to your address book](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=0b66be983a)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=0b66be983a&e=4f010155df) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=0b66be983a&e=4f010155df&c=abf2990455).

name: Bloomberg Philanthropies
subject: Trump is endangering vulnerable communities
body:
He is allowing more pollution in the places hardest hit by COVID-19.

| _You're receiving this email because of your participation with Mike Bloomberg 2020. We'll be sending you updates like this on initiatives and issues we think you'll be interested in. Thank you!_ [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=f775f60ee8ed4ee7b0bf52b902964910&_e=iqiRgs-s9CGoUElusuKp8d8aTN3SBdopOsZRBzS96_kULY5qvm6sdUq-2qileFYlzUjE4YUEayVUYjZSk0qZR0y1U9_7xXlH3LTvJD0PrybBzPmxZEaDqyuZkmq-91Sb13hwv868zpL-JeBmmSCp9bpMliKz7rjpq5w1zmJgGFbBt7SS-g5CTZhM2boZ9cftpxBK_y7YdpO_1qmgnVOvyzZs6ugDqY9QgD9Lo8TrS4XXk0t8SMQQTYGCSl-MiqZI23yQMrGHYpQcuCjTDnh5SjAzB5ugldNT57rWhsfT526VwmMHNBkS2UE9iE1iOGoL) Friend, A recent study shows that even a tiny increase in fine particulate matter air pollution increases death rates from COVID-19. And the hardest hit are low-income communities and people of color, who are disproportionately exposed to pollution. Now, Trump is making the problem worse. With a highly contagious lung disease raging, his administration has taken actions to allow even more air pollution into our communities. **[Mike and Gina McCarthy, former administrator of the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency, explained today why these actions are so dangerous. Read their article.](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=f775f60ee8ed4ee7b0bf52b902964910&_e=iqiRgs-s9CGoUElusuKp8Un54avZYsEGWvmSauTYj5DwNlpAuDgRxmLoWnwUe4fOdPw5RStElmwUQwMhxxm0nL2uVjlsOmQsSbQRtZlxpaddPatHxxKIfn621A6RenH9Dgr7VnC6fg1lYqCaTC_lXRSuc1O3svrNIAhIWn7lS9D3XLwGsTtfdgZfWi659lq2Du353boJnR9fUUaYOC37we8yoPo_IMLgE5RSt90KULR0PzuDqY05LyCoSvDlGXh2J3UYjzov_J06Lo_NLhKFG5dQTKAj4yrd8m2TDvkmUcTn26ssh_AJuP4xUCXZ_aqWT_u76xb3mQRmGn9gmoqU0C2UEU3xJ1WsFxhnC2NbapCDSRtA5y4odkOM-4N3NzlV4U3ehwIqB0uBuN912DNWIWz5T3JIK95lW2LDpX-yEuovWcy8rG68iuZPXXyECvkj)** The Trump administration has mounted a slow and inadequate response to COVID-19 -- but they've wasted no time trying to help polluters. In the last month, the administration has refused to regulate polluters and has undermined existing standards -- including protections that were saving more than 10,000 lives, and preventing 130,000 asthma attacks and nearly 5,000 heart attacks a year. Read Mike and Gina's article to get the facts on how the Trump administration is putting air polluters over people -- even as thousands fall victim to a deadly respiratory illness: [**https://www.bloomberg.com/opinion/articles/2020-05-04/how-trump-s-epa-is-making-covid-19-more-deadly**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=f775f60ee8ed4ee7b0bf52b902964910&_e=iqiRgs-s9CGoUElusuKp8Un54avZYsEGWvmSauTYj5DwNlpAuDgRxmLoWnwUe4fOdPw5RStElmwUQwMhxxm0nL2uVjlsOmQsSbQRtZlxpaddPatHxxKIfn621A6RenH9Dgr7VnC6fg1lYqCaTC_lXRSuc1O3svrNIAhIWn7lS9D3XLwGsTtfdgZfWi659lq2Du353boJnR9fUUaYOC37we8yoPo_IMLgE5RSt90KULT8lmR6MZSDulnr5Kcc2gs9Nb2NCuNkkuP1dJjOVur5tujxdiQPZcR0pdOzPDfHlrLrk4xAEQW8GlXVPzQNIz2tapkH818gs6WEDPx_7oEg2ZP3FiRprUgWqFctJBbo2t3hkZImxD7rMfCm_PjiIOxuLESjZ9u1sByyLZjSSh9YK1t8VUwFk_nMXGotFpiLMQ69S1qUkRG9N6ip1y6RbzyY) Thanks, Bloomberg Philanthropies

---

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=f775f60ee8ed4ee7b0bf52b902964910&_e=iqiRgs-s9CGoUElusuKp8VcOvPB8Vod3Y94twDWJysNZq79yVQi0MO8qzys5lAjxQ9YavqJea46I9fm0_rbHsc12iWsvOi9YQI5sA3mc_497Bk77PWfQ3aRdHAfUGthRNrpeCE9st-wWkc_kK1JaXQNb6Fg1YkqVAojJXH_SAL9bnBN1Pp1ImFbS8lfh8nYwLSle5Gs8fi7do3W9w46Ag-q2fc5NwXzwhgdXNok9O8GnQ4KsX5e6Eti1lC8G4VVYbYFIOvxhsR3WcwhwBny7DPShMDrJiHj68Y4zjXf1KX4%3D) | | [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=f775f60ee8ed4ee7b0bf52b902964910&_e=iqiRgs-s9CGoUElusuKp8forMf__gSRfkdHFhvgPf-m6C1u9cmgvT4Qhp4oULxIAOYWSVb8C_DSFibBHbYCe76MWmhUsRoHiIytnRzW9bKFtukvZWGc2tzNBOp3_-QZEOASFR93bv66YfUwyoV1p9Of51yO_ZdH4E3cE5AMBHNihGQyv0eo7KF9a0szAQiLABWFN8wcQI-JsemV2LA2fK5moZWX51FD96DkamSspP5sEw2ztNabFVh6XqwhgrVTDDU0bDOfuSw3umIcfMHCrUg%3D%3D) | | [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=f775f60ee8ed4ee7b0bf52b902964910&_e=iqiRgs-s9CGoUElusuKp8bt770BhDmRpjh96xp00r9cN3-ykjiFU-COxywprCvjjwKnaRfnoQoZ9cbtRd_JccWGGujvdEfm63wUzLO7Jf6m01LUJVdzLZIsH7GEdmgwSFJ0l6_4NT914DaArPFwbD-oB00wfIW-uSnrAy0w7LwkXzQlOa9js9_2QRTWXwTiqk_qFHjjn0rxYbBxVzzSpXl_czjXCyIkKEQmEnbBlF_uClOZMwkMMS9zowGou11pzFAnehO2bgxO2aAiM5zrtM7lY5ygXY0lpLIGQCAHs9iw%3D)

body:
Friends,
President Trump is coming to Arizona tomorrow!
I, for one, am super excited about his visit. It is refreshing to have a President who cares about the Grand Canyon State.
President Trump will be showcasing Arizona’s great manufacturing strength for the whole world to see.
President Trump is relying on me to help **take back the House.** Friends, join the fight to **replace Speaker Pelosi** with a Trump supporting conservative. [ **MAKE YOUR IMMEDIATE IMPACT** name: Team Christy
subject: Bad news: Garcia is ahead of us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter,

With each passing day, more and more special election ballots arrive by mail to the board of elections. And with each vote, this election comes closer to being decided.

Our team is remaining vigilant and closely tracking ballot movement. As of now, we've got some bad news to share: **Republican special interests and Trump's favorite candidate Mike Garcia are way ahead of us by party registration.**

We're worried, but this is by no means definitive. We've still got time on our side and the tools required to turn things around. Our plan is simple: reach out to as many voters as possible and make sure they're getting their ballots filled out and submitted. To do that, we need your help, Peter.

**[We need your support to turn the tide back in our favor. Can you help by rushing a donation of $5 or more right now?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb15/29776869/a7e0cb7/569f76a4/3047212067/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDRfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw4LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200504_milliongoal8-full")**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb15/29776869/a7e0cb7/569f76a5/3047212067/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDRfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw4LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200504_milliongoal8-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb15/29776869/a7e0cb7/569f76a6/3047212067/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDRfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw4LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200504_milliongoal8-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")

[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb15/29776869/a7e0cb7/569f76a7/3047212067/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDRfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw4LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200504_milliongoal8-full&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb15/29776869/a7e0cb7/569f76a0/3047212067/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDRfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw4LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200504_milliongoal8-full&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb15/29776869/a7e0cb7/569f76a1/3047212067/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDRfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw4LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200504_milliongoal8-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb15/29776869/a7e0cb7/569f76a4/3047212067/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDRfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw4LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200504_milliongoal8-full")
We're going to get in touch with voters every way imaginable: social media, email, direct mail, text messages, phone calls, and literature drops.

This election is far too important to the grand scheme of 2020. Right now, we're behind and need to catch up.

It won't be easy or cheap. We set a goal of $1 million dollars last Friday, and we're counting on that money to fuel our efforts. Otherwise, Garcia's lead will continue to grow.

**[We need to put the odds back in our favor. Can you chip in $5 or whatever you can afford to help crush this goal?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb15/29776869/a7e0cb7/569f76a4/3047212067/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDRfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw4LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200504_milliongoal8-full")**

Thank you,

Team Christy

With a campaign built on nothing but bullying tactics, Raul Reyes is running one of the most negative, desperate campaigns in Texas history. name: Doyle Canning
subject: scare tactics from the establishment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CANNING FOR CONGRESS ](https://u1584542
body:
I asked Rep. Peter DeFazio about his statement that transitioning off of fossil fuels by 2030 was “impossible.” To my disbelief, he doubled down. When I pressed on what action he would take, he proposed “fixing our traffic lights.” His response was terrif | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/CgE/ni0YAA/t.31i/XeJLC0xzSgG9nDj9ZVssVw/h0/EITbMdFK8sEmH288ys-2B-2Fh8ph-2FrB9A6-2BM0i5qCb2xsCyiK7xXkJftbeIVM7HbMWah-2F-2FTUy7T-2FpE-2Ban7TzilxtVHMJk6Ko3XMudiK22ctjhsmRptTnUeLyseIwv7dBH718v8rvyiRtWN6bI51O-2Fd-2FP9iThq9VLwhlkVoiU07CtEKdpaI7d-2FqNPSu67T4kWMEjvYKp2lD8mQn6EuD2MSTVrH4aIZGB2TPsaxmltioxWoDRvBQCuvvrc-2FWmM5n6qr4OQT-2FsOcKunK-2FYS9Juk0356lmk-2FBy6BDLPGSVPn3BmsjOc-3D/F8BX)

Dear Friend, Last week I wrote an op-ed in the Register-Guard, publicly asking the incumbent to debate with me on the issues that matter to voters most: housing, healthcare, COVID recovery, and climate. I called out his Republican record on gun rights and immigration, and explained that our campaign has built the coalition that can win in November. I'm including the whole piece below because I want you to read it and forward it to friends. I also need your help to make sure that every Democratic primary voter in Southwest Oregon sees this content on social media this week. Our campaign is in the final stretch, and we need all hands on deck, and every dollar focused on fighting for every last vote. While DeFazio just cashed a big check from a DC lobbyist in the final days before the election, I am counting on you to make the difference. Ballots are in mailboxes now, and voters are already making up their minds. Peter DeFazio about his statement that transitioning off of fossil fuels by 2030 was "[impossible](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/CgE/ni0YAA/t.31i/XeJLC0xzSgG9nDj9ZVssVw/h5/uTjwWbnOEn8QqC1FO-2BOpUWkpjWkcV01FEe5X9qylZqyRWUA5F7OpyEVTtvczoWBUVd2zcZaxdtzIGrrb-2FfRLTCnah4v0GAf4SVusyQ0s67EjEngGEL9yzFRUK1BY-2B9u4vx0iIn2WfW3iTwUBRyUpBUqjQRxwgGIS-2FbUG-2Bo3R6os-2Brry9Uw-2BHcv1DTTUDbKRBwpU0vwQSX9-2FrZN29a6V-2Fm3HgYLhi-2B-2FlNmo11XDAnP-2Bep2LykI-2B3dAbHDNHTTkFMyepPzsXkyeBO18NmBirCeF68T-2B4WajLYcR2Ww0e-2BC-2BFtPxjdGLL3LWmK3itcIlUelzg5Q63cNAVrxpH3cCXzJFE5METb1Bp5C0X4-2BlQ4flc0VjHykBlqbynp0aPVsGfBo/S8Tz)." His response was terrifyingly out of touch with the scope of the climate crisis. As I squeezed my daughter's hand in mine, I knew that I would run for Congress, because our kids need a champion. Now. We are days from the Democratic primary and it is time for DeFazio to answer the call for a debate on the issues that matter most to voters: housing, healthcare, climate, COVID-19 recovery and more. My campaign has the most volunteers, the most local endorsements from grassroots organizations and is energizing voters to ensure victory in the general election. I am the first viable challenger in 33 years, and the first woman ever to run in the Democratic primary for Congress. When I pressed on what action he would take, he proposed “fixing our traffic lights.” His response was terrif | | Dear Friend, Last week I wrote an op-ed in the Register-Guard, publicly asking the incumbent to debate with me on the issues that matter to voters most: housing, healthcare, COVID recovery, and climate. I called out his Republican record on gun rights and immigration, and explained that our campaign has built the coalition that can win in November. I'm including the whole piece below because I want you to read it and forward it to friends. I also need your help to make sure that every Democratic primary voter in Southwest Oregon sees this content on social media this week. Our campaign is in the final stretch, and we need all hands on deck, and every dollar focused on fighting for every last vote. While DeFazio just cashed a big check from a DC lobbyist in the final days before the election, I am counting on you to make the difference. Ballots are in mailboxes now, and voters are already making up their minds. . | Last January I was marching south on Coburg Road in honor of Dr. Martin Luther King, hand in hand with my then five-year-old daughter. The theme was climate justice, so I asked Rep. Peter DeFazio about his statement that transitioning off of fossil fuels by 2030 was "." To my disbelief, he doubled down. When I pressed on what action he would take, he proposed "fixing our traffic lights." His response was terrifyingly out of touch with the scope of the climate crisis. As I squeezed my daughter's hand in mine, I knew that I would run for Congress, because our kids need a champion. Now. We are days from the Democratic primary and it is time for DeFazio to answer the call for a debate on the issues that matter most to voters: housing, healthcare, climate, COVID-19 recovery and more. My campaign has the most volunteers, the most local endorsements from grassroots organizations and is energizing voters to ensure victory in the general election. I am the first viable challenger in 33 years, and the first woman ever to run in the Democratic primary for Congress. I am the first to call out DeFazio's corporate donations from the fossil fuel, timber, health insurance, aviation, weapons and big pharma industries. DeFazio's response to my insurgent challenge has been to and pretend like our positions on the issues are the same. They're not. On Housing: Eugene leads the nation in homelessness. I am fighting for national solutions to the housing crisis, and COVID-19 recovery solutions that ensure everyone can pay their rent and mortgage, and protects essential workers with a . DeFazio , and has no long term housing plan either. On Healthcare: Like , I support Medicare for All. DeFazio has long , and in this election has taken money from a health insurance industry lobbying group dedicated to . On Immigration: I have spent over a decade supporting low-wage immigrant workers and have been a leader in anti-racist movements. I would never support President Donald Trump's anti-immigrant agenda. But in 2017 , voting on a bill pushed by like Stephen Miller and Steve Bannon. DeFazio has a of anti-immigrant votes. On Common-Sense Gun Reform: I have a child who came home from pre-school and re-enacted a lockdown drill in my living room, and . DeFazio, described as a "," is one of the in the House who did not support the Assault Weapons Ban last year. On Electability: I've been told "A progressive can't win," and that we should settle for the status quo because, although Hillary Clinton won here, she didn't do well. These are scare tactics from the establishment: Every political report has our district pegged as . Support for - is very strong -- not only in Lane County, but also in . I will work to earn the support of the roughly that wrote in Sanders or voted Green in the general in 2016 because they want real change. Peter,

The liberals are emboldened by their win in the Wisconsin Supreme Court race last month, and we know they will pull out every trick and sneaky tactic in their playbook to score an upset victory in the May 12th special election.

_We cannot let that happen!_

Tom Tiffany is the Republican running to fill the seat vacated by retired Congressman Sean Duffy and he needs our help to win the May 12th special congressional election for Wisconsin's 7th District.

**_[Support Republican Tom Tiffany for Congress today.](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/55088447:sNWfH6-sN:m:1:1155937413:BC16DFA2D77944B5C42487D1C502543C:r)**_
**He is the proven conservative we can trust to defend our values and our President.**
One of my strongest allies in the State Senate, Tom worked with me on a number of key reforms that moved Wisconsin forward and made Wisconsin a conservative model for the nation. We balanced the state budget, defunded Planned Parenthood, slashed taxes, and drained the swamp in Madison.

**_He is ready to go to Washington where he will stand with President Trump and fight for all of us.**_

**_[Chip in now to give Tom Tiffany the edge going into these crucial final days.](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/55088447:sNWfH6-sN:m:1:1155937413:BC16DFA2D77944B5C42487D1C502543C:r)**_

Tom's record is solid - and his character represents the best of Wisconsin. A small businessman and citizen legislator, Tom is pro-life, pro-gun, and pro-Wisconsin worker.

Take it from me, he is the kind of person you want on your side when the going gets tough. Our country is facing unprecedented challenges right now and America needs a proven problem solver like Tom Tiffany.

name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: Check-Up with Dr. Manny 5/4
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:

| |
---|---|---
| Friends, I'm grateful that we are beginning to get our economy reopened. I'm thrilled that we are closer to getting back out on the road in our big orange bus and meeting Tennesseans all across the state. I know many of you, like me, are anxious to resume your normal lives. I would continue to recommend exercising caution when in public and maintain social distancing protocols. As always, if you have any questions or I can help in any way, please feel free to email me directly at [manny@drmannyforsenate.com](http://manny@drmannyforsenate.com), or give me a call at (615) 200-7195. **News: ** Last week, I joined Fox News to discuss updates from the frontlines of COVID-19 and talk about the White House's plans to ramp up statewide testing. [Watch my interview with Fox News here!](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jklrdyud-olhhkyhhid-j/) I also released a plan to get our economy reopened while following public health and safety regulations so that we can get Tennesseans back to work, while also making sure this virus doesn't come back. [Read my commentary in the _Tennessean_ here.](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jklrdyud-olhhkyhhid-t/) **Social Media:** [](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jklrdyud-olhhkyhhid-i/) Last week, President Trump decided to halt all immigration while we figure out how to get our country back to work. I completely agree with the President and have been calling for a similar plan since the fall. [You can read my immigration plan we released last October here](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jklrdyud-olhhkyhhid-d/), [as well as my statement regarding President Trump's decision here](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jklrdyud-olhhkyhhid-h/). Follow us on [Facebook](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jklrdyud-olhhkyhhid-k/), [Twitter](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jklrdyud-olhhkyhhid-u/), and [Instagram](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jklrdyud-olhhkyhhid-o/) to keep up with all that we are doing during this pandemic. We aren't slowing this campaign down as we work towards victory in August! **COVID-19 Resources:** There are many resources at your disposal. I urge you to order take-out, donate blood, wear a mask even if you are feeling fine, and above all, pray for our country during this time. Also please continue to adhere to the guidelines being put forth by [President Trump](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jklrdyud-olhhkyhhid-b/), [Governor Lee](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jklrdyud-olhhkyhhid-n/), and [the CDC](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jklrdyud-olhhkyhhid-p/), even as the economy gets up and running again. I can't wait to get back out to every corner of Tennessee in our big orange bus and continue to see you all! Stay safe out there. I'm praying for all of us! Dr. Manny P.S. There are less than 100 days until Election Day! A donation right now will help me reach the US Senate and be a true representative of YOU, instead of a Washington insider. [DoNATe herE](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jklrdyud-olhhkyhhid-x/) Copyright © 2019 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.
Our mailing address is:
PO Box 58068, Nashville, TN 37205 |

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Here's a look at how business can start to reopen next week
body:
Your daily Rhode Island COVID-19 update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
As we get closer to starting to reopen Rhode Island, I want everyone to be prepared for what's next. Phase 1 is testing the waters, and things won't look or feel much different than they do now. Our lives aren't going to change overnight. While we won't be required to stay at home, we should still stay close to home as we slowly get back to work. Today I want to talk about some of the changes we're going to see once the stay at home order is lifted.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q3KD-fAg8joxd-HS6oggCCTtbGrtGpbFTskWYw3abOyiNSUckD70VDeWjptFzm6Tkk6v5URPEGGGzxtkoYnPcmrwGTjHMhUZ4p6lMM7YHDVnUOnF65LRcdlcGD3yp_6NnhnapYH2ffSearCAqj_xkMgtjlg5BRlmqQjJ8wQ48eFcjrMJLQWlaExqjiTcoguZczionnMNum8=&c=lkEbOq8mK9TNJ8_pRLiiN0Y617UkJNgZoevjw0Yk3jOO34SUYG8nDA==&ch=0AKGv3AH7dZ5KpFexmNUHzLreG6M0iIYPqgkeXNTZEscECGnWoG-CA==)
---
| To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's [new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q3KD-fAg8joxd-HS6oggCCTtbGrtGpbFTskWYw3abOyiNSUckD70VDeWjptFzm6Tkk6v5URPEGGGzxtkoYnPcmrwGTjHMhUZ4p6lMM7YHDVnUOnF65LRcdlcGD3yp_6NnhnapYH2ffSearCAqj_xkMgtjlg5BRlmqQjJ8wQ48eFcjrMJLQWlaExqjiTcoguZczionnMNum8=&c=lkEbOq8mK9TNJ8_pRLiiN0Y617UkJNgZoevjw0Yk3jOO34SUYG8nDA==&ch=0AKGv3AH7dZ5KpFexmNUHzLreG6M0iIYPqgkeXNTZEscECGnWoG-CA==) for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
| Retail has been one of the industries hit hardest by this crisis, and too many Rhode Islanders have lost their jobs as stores needed to close and adapt to a new online reality. In phase 1, non-critical retail stores that have been closed will be allowed to reopen in-person operations under new capacity restrictions.
Rhode Island's many incredible restaurants have also been especially hit hard. Getting back to some version of normal is going to be a slow process. It's not going to happen at the beginning of phase 1, but we're working to allow limited outdoor in-person seating options a bit further into our first phase.
---
|
---
| Finally, I want to talk about working in offices. During phase 1, everyone who can work from home should continue to work from home. But our employers should begin taking steps immediately to prepare for eventually bringing more employees back into the office. That means doing things like developing staggered work schedules, preparing to screen employees to find out if they're sick, closing common spaces like break rooms and making sure employees can be 6-feet apart. This also means we're going to need more frequent cleaning. I know most of our employers are already thinking about these things, and I appreciate their partnership and collaboration throughout this process.
For more details on Phase 1, visit [reopeningri.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q3KD-fAg8joxd-HS6oggCCTtbGrtGpbFTskWYw3abOyiNSUckD70VAL7Wk-2SQwhdShDjAV3r31quvCfw25NUQtE4BbGn2jxJ_E00WoqogaxIyFmMXbS2kvCgmu45buvuum9syu8UBZpTQ2h5iW1fA==&c=lkEbOq8mK9TNJ8_pRLiiN0Y617UkJNgZoevjw0Yk3jOO34SUYG8nDA==&ch=0AKGv3AH7dZ5KpFexmNUHzLreG6M0iIYPqgkeXNTZEscECGnWoG-CA==).
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q3KD-fAg8joxd-HS6oggCCTtbGrtGpbFTskWYw3abOyiNSUckD70VFlGvQf0vCJ3vvZJe0xBb--UncqImjFRoXGSmV5EhvDeCXAtujT00zqogOM-kKDMhL-7p0OJQznEG69wSTLA3c8W_pDHStuoVypi_etePMUbF6QXIAqov2c8tUJfz2k9CGeowG0Tr3Pr7-TJCqVwVZA71PQuM55dLwUdWfgfcsFCzVX9Yy5Kxj0=&c=lkEbOq8mK9TNJ8_pRLiiN0Y617UkJNgZoevjw0Yk3jOO34SUYG8nDA==&ch=0AKGv3AH7dZ5KpFexmNUHzLreG6M0iIYPqgkeXNTZEscECGnWoG-CA==)
---
| I've never been prouder to be a Rhode Islander. The ways in which our community has come together to lift one another up during this crisis, and the seriousness with which we've taken our obligation to stay home, has been an inspiration to me and to so many people, and it's saved countless lives. Because of all of you, I'm cautiously optimistic that we might be able to lift our stay-at-home order at the end of this week. Keep it up. I know we can do this.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q3KD-fAg8joxd-HS6oggCCTtbGrtGpbFTskWYw3abOyiNSUckD70VFlGvQf0vCJ31nxYZeHgFjG_nzbL0lrIxW_icx1gtvsmQmOTGXfT5mjAnqSMuJ-iffdrwpXAqHQSqpmnqG7zrz0aTmcGAmkUyp_bm5Yq5PLWfURLtu08Uo5rl19YUdxCy0fUFYf4aQvN58CKuihcL2Cy4zsTYOgbhQ07aunj2TWE44O7zcC-UzkKra8XW9YzGAco2a2yrswlrcT0MBiJmCXdefOifbMECWbrAmsA7fr3PMx7F_UQXqnW2kU_KVUUbb01JNPF0Ak-4KDJrA2o7XY=&c=lkEbOq8mK9TNJ8_pRLiiN0Y617UkJNgZoevjw0Yk3jOO34SUYG8nDA==&ch=0AKGv3AH7dZ5KpFexmNUHzLreG6M0iIYPqgkeXNTZEscECGnWoG-CA==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=4d22e201-a580-49ba-adb4-2936defd9cab)
---
[Update Profile](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=oo&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=4d22e201-a580-49ba-adb4-2936defd9cab) | [About Constant Contact](http://www.constantcontact.com/legal/about-constant-contact)
Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) in collaboration with
| [ ](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE)
---

name: Bettina Weiss
subject: a quick update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/5b2z61lWQq1CMgjzZuQ9l1Lv7kwHuul9tiUAfGSRDqA=/1xIh-1Ixp4Iw36VO9_vQuJY2oghC4aBl-eDCW50ngXs=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20200504-2-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

I wanted to share a quick update with you about our campaign's progress during this challenging time.

**[-> We have had a tremendous number of volunteers reach out to support our campaign.](https://act.myngp.com/el/5b2z61lWQq1CMgjzZuQ9l1Lv7kwHuul9tiUAfGSRDqA=/1xIh-1Ixp4Iw36VO9_vQuJY2oghC4aBl-eDCW50ngXs=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20200504-2-EM&amount=25)** We've now trained more than 150 volunteers on how to make phone calls remotely! We're making calls every day, checking in with 2018 volunteers, and giving campaign updates.

**[-> Our opponents are booking TV time for the late summer and fall.](https://act.myngp.com/el/5b2z61lWQq1CMgjzZuQ9l1Lv7kwHuul9tiUAfGSRDqA=/1xIh-1Ixp4Iw36VO9_vQuJY2oghC4aBl-eDCW50ngXs=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20200504-2-EM&amount=25)** We closely monitor these reservations and so far we know that outside groups have already booked over $1.5 million in ads against us.

**[-> Grassroots donors have come through in a big way.](https://act.myngp.com/el/5b2z61lWQq1CMgjzZuQ9l1Lv7kwHuul9tiUAfGSRDqA=/1xIh-1Ixp4Iw36VO9_vQuJY2oghC4aBl-eDCW50ngXs=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20200504-2-EM&amount=25)** We've had to cancel all of our in-person fundraising events, but we're hosting virtual events, and, as always, our grassroots digital donors continued to support our campaign with small-dollar donations.

**[-> Our opponents are booking TV time for the late summer and fall.](https://act.myngp.com/el/5b2z61lWQq1CMgjzZuQ9l1Lv7kwHuul9tiUAfGSRDqA=/1xIh-1Ixp4Iw36VO9_vQuJY2oghC4aBl-eDCW50ngXs=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20200504-2-EM&amount=25)** We closely monitor these reservations and so far we know that outside groups have already booked over $1 million in ads against us.

Peter, there may be uncertainties right now, but we must continue building the strongest campaign possible in order to win in November.

We know that many people are facing financial uncertainty. If you're able to make a contribution to our campaign, we would sincerely appreciate it.
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/5b2z61lWQq1CMgjzZuQ9l1Lv7kwHuul9tiUAfGSRDqA=/1xIh-1Ixp4Iw36VO9_vQuJY2oghC4aBl-eDCW50ngXs=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20200504-2-EM&amount=25)
---
Hoping you're safe and healthy.

Thank you,
_Bettina_

* * *

clean_body: | | Peter, I wanted to share a quick update with you about our campaign's progress during this challenging time. We've now trained more than 150 volunteers on how to make phone calls remotely! We're making calls every day, checking in with 2018 volunteers, and giving campaign updates. We closely monitor these reservations and so far we know that outside groups have already booked over $1.5 million in ads against us. We've had to cancel all of our in-person fundraising events, but we're hosting virtual events, and, as always, our grassroots digital donors continued to support our campaign with small-dollar donations. We closely monitor these reservations and so far we know that outside groups have already booked over $1 million in ads against us. Peter, there may be uncertainties right now, but we must continue building the strongest campaign possible in order to win in November. We know that many people are facing financial uncertainty. If you're able to make a contribution to our campaign, we would sincerely appreciate it. | Hoping you're safe and healthy. Thank you, Bettina * | | | Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress PO Box 3121 Glen Allen VA 23058 United States Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. name: Team Messner
subject: Join Corky for tonight’s tele-town meeting!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
This event is TONIGHT at 6:30 p.m. Get the details & RSVP now! >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1aa6f98c9c8effb4/7131b17ecc609c0bc3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, Have you RSVP’ed yet? Corky is holding a tele-town hall tonight and he wants you to be there. Things are a little different during the current pandemic, and we’ve had to cancel all of our in-person events to battle the coronavirus. But it’s important for Corky to keep you up-to-date on all the latest developments in our race, and give you the opportunity to ask him any questions you may have. **Tonight, we’re hosting a LIVE “Granite State Conversations” tele-town hall meeting, with a particular focus on the city of Concord and Merrimack county!**

It's easy to join in. Just take these two simple steps:
1. [**Tap or click here to RSVP**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1aa6f98c9c8effb4/dbafe9100d497324c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
2. Call in tonight at 6:30 p.m. to join. The phone number is (603) 506-4097.

Corky will be talking about the upcoming race to flip this seat RED by defeating career politician Jeanne Shaheen, and how we’ve shifted our campaign strategy to win while dealing with the COVID-19 crisis. **Don’t forget that this in an interactive event, so please bring your questions for Corky!** We’ll see you there - **[Follow this link to RSVP now!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1aa6f98c9c8effb4/0d9fa05e6fb85704c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** -Team Messner | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1aa6f98c9c8effb4/f14e92dc6bbbf28cc3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1aa6f98c9c8effb4/f85f664b36bed6c0c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

body:
Applications Due May 14, 2020
Fellow Democrat,
**Reminder: Applications to become a Delegate to the National Convention are due May 14, 2020! **
We know these are unforeen times and we hope you and your loved ones are safe and well. A lot is changing for everyone and while some things are still uncertain, we do not want you to miss your opportunity to run to be a Delegate to the Democratic National Convention.
**Your applications to run for PLEO, District-Level, At-Large, and Alternates are all due on May 14, 2020 to the West Virginia Democratic Party/WVSDEC. **
**Your applications can be found at the following links:**
**The At-Large, District-Level, & Alternate Application may be found here: **[https://wvdemocrats.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/National-Convention-Delegate-Candidate-District_At-Large-2020.pdf](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17380731/192436333/11721750?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTJjNTQ5YS1lNjhlLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FEHfrrT6mx094nQtucx6D0fZLqUGD8XSlGEnTKUkft8=&emci=8c079531-e68e-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=252c549a-e68e-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=5094937)

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: Today is a big day
body:
Peter,
Do you know what today is? Well yes, it’s Cinco de Mayo, but that’s not what I’m talking about.
Today is #GivingTuesdayNow, which is a global day of unity and giving in order to create a wave of generosity and civic engagement. In short, millions of people around America and the entire world will be opening their wallets to help nonprofit organizations that are making a difference.
As so many of our fellow Americans continue to struggle, I pray you will find some great organizations on the frontlines of this pandemic to generously support.
[With this in mind, I also asked the team at My Faith Votes to crunch some numbers. As you and others seek to have an impact, I wanted to also show how you can support My Faith Votes with a very small donation -- and that amount is just $3.20](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200505apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200505apl01amnd&n=1).
It may not sound like much, but that’s what it will take to equip a Christian voter in a critical 2020 battleground state. For about the cost of a cup of coffee, that person will receive a Christian voter guide, information on voter registration, polling locations and absentee ballots, as well as a handful of other resources.
It’s this kind of lean, targeted action that covered 80,000 elections in 2018, and this year, it’s how My Faith Votes is going to activate 1 million new Christian voters in 11 swing states.
[So today, when millions of people are seeking to make a difference in their own way, I’d like to ask you how many Christian voters can you help to equip? Can you help to reach one person for $3.20, or perhaps a couple more? If so, please head over to do it today](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200505apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200505apl01amnd&n=2).
I’m excited to see what comes of today. I believe the My Faith Votes team will arrive at work Wednesday morning with a whole new spirit and pep in their step, ready to do some good, because of you.
[I know how hard My Faith Votes works every day to revive America, and your support on #GivingTuesdayNow would really mean a lot](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200505apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200505apl01amnd&n=3).
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200505apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200505apl01amnd&n=4)
Thanks for anything you’re able to do.
Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200505apl01amnd&n=5)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200505apl01amnd&n=6).
clean_body: Peter, Do you know what today is? Well yes, it’s Cinco de Mayo, but that’s not what I’m talking about. Today is #GivingTuesdayNow, which is a global day of unity and giving in order to create a wave of generosity and civic engagement. In short, millions of people around America and the entire world will be opening their wallets to help nonprofit organizations that are making a difference. As so many of our fellow Americans continue to struggle, I pray you will find some great organizations on the frontlines of this pandemic to generously support. . It may not sound like much, but that’s what it will take to equip a Christian voter in a critical 2020 battleground state. For about the cost of a cup of coffee, that person will receive a Christian voter guide, information on voter registration, polling locations and absentee ballots, as well as a handful of other resources. It’s this kind of lean, targeted action that covered 80,000 elections in 2018, and this year, it’s how My Faith Votes is going to activate 1 million new Christian voters in 11 swing states. . I’m excited to see what comes of today. I believe the My Faith Votes team will arrive at work Wednesday morning with a whole new spirit and pep in their step, ready to do some good, because of you. . Thanks for anything you’re able to do. Gov. Mike Huckabee Honorary National Chairman ©2020 My Faith Votes 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

| | Friends, Today marks six weeks until Election Day in New York. Francis is running to flip one of the last remaining congressional districts won by Hillary Clinton in 2016 -- and he's our best chance to get it done. **But first, we have to win our fast-approaching primary. In honor of being exactly six weeks until Election Day, we want to raise $6,000 in the next 24 hours.[Can you pitch in to help us reach this ambitious goal?](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b4d4/388db0e9/8d5b12f/609b9f74/70985814/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJjb25fbW9udGhseV9hcHIiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiQ09OX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDUwNV82d2Vla3MxX1UxX1gxIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiMjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/con_monthly_apr?refcode=CON_EM_FR_200505_6weeks1_U1_X1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2+-+Can+you+pitch+in+to+help+us+reach+this+a&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200505_6weeks1_U1_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200505_6weeks1_U1_X1")** | | | [Chip in $25 >>](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b4d4/388db0e9/8d5b12f/609b9f73/70985814/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJjb25fbW9udGhseV9hcHIiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiQ09OX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDUwNV82d2Vla3MxX1UxX1gxIn0%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/con_monthly_apr?refcode=CON_EM_FR_200505_6weeks1_U1_X1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+25+gtgt&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200505_6weeks1_U1_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200505_6weeks1_U1_X1")

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: I'm asking you, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Winning in Georgia is key to Democrats righting the ship and retaking the Senate majority.

| | |
---
Friend,

This is a difficult time in our nation's history.

The threats we're facing - from foreign election interference to stagnating wages to global health crises - put the future of our democracy at risk.
That's why this year's elections are the most consequential of our lifetimes - and why it's never been more important to elect Democratic leaders who will fight for the most vulnerable among us. **That's why I endorsed Reverend Raphael Warnock for U.S. Senate in Georgia - [and why I'm asking you to support his campaign today.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e7ff/288179be/a487d87/348e9195/3013874151/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjAxLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk201-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Reverend Warnock is the senior pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church, the spiritual home of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. If elected, he'd be the first black senator our state has _ever_ elected. Reverend Warnock is running to restore moral leadership to Washington and to stand up for Georgia families who have been left behind by Republicans like Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump.
With Republicans turning their backs on the hardworking people of Georgia, it's never been more important _ _ to elect leaders like Reverend Warnock who will lead _by and for the people_ - someone who will be a champion for voting rights, workers' rights, affordable health care and more.

Reverend Warnock gives me hope that we can create a better and brighter future for all, not just the lucky few.
But here's what's at stake: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats _can_ take back the Senate - but we _have_ to win in Georgia. Winning this battleground state is key to Democrats righting the ship and retaking the Senate majority.
**Right now, Reverend Warnock is up against a _crucial_ fundraising deadline - but with time running out, he's still falling short and can't make up the difference without your support. So I have to ask: ****[Please, friend, will you give $5 or more now- before midnight tonight - to help Reverend Warnock flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e7ff/288179be/a487d87/348e9195/3013874151/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjAxLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk201-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks for fighting with us.

Stacey Abrams
| | [Contribute](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e7ff/288179be/a487d87/348e9195/3013874151/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjAxLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk201-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Team Michelle
subject: Michelle's ready to answer your questions
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
_Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

Friends,

While our campaign strategy has changed over the last few weeks, and we can't hold in-person events at the moment -- Michelle still wants the opportunity to talk with voters directly about the issues that matter most to them.

That's why she's hosting a Zoom town hall this week to discuss healthcare -- **with a very special guest, former Secretary of Health and Human Services, Kathleen Sebelius!** This is an opportunity for us to meet with voters face-to-face (virtually) and answer any questions you might have.

Whether you want to learn more about Michelle's plan to expand access to affordable healthcare or her vision for rural healthcare in Kansas -- Michelle is looking forward to talking directly with you about this important issue.

**[Interested in joining the conversation? Click here to RSVP for our virtual town hall with Secretary Kathleen Sebelius tomorrow night!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17383873/192487495/-1164011296?fbclid=IwAR2SFx33itqhZNp4wRWhPoJzsK1E7laiJbTcFvJXRC2B8OSHJcwGKWPk63A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGM2YjMzZC1mYThlLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uFM4b6nDNSzagTt4XZykubRqxCcKvcwhedcyQugeU8w=&emci=1fa7db70-e48e-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=c4c6b33d-fa8e-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9593007)**

* * *
Rita is the most giving person I know 🎂 **[Help me celebrate her birthday by donating towards our fight to send her to Washington](https://act.myngp.com/el/BelZwRjAOCUDpU1wBZwy4SLlKUK0_fvWqBQx7RCpxv4=/ewKMlYeocpG2QHTvzeeW40bxbP3-vrh3b7hQ3BJ0shg=?refcode=200505-email)** 🎂 | [DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/BelZwRjAOCUDpU1wBZwy4SLlKUK0_fvWqBQx7RCpxv4=/EGzwh-BaieRvkZDmKG9j4gStQXG8ebUQLdpRVD58GgQ=?refcode=200505-email)

* * *
Yes, Peter, today is Rita's birthday!
Rita always finds a way to lean in and be there for people. If someone needs a listening ear, she listens even if she's tired or worn out herself. Not only that, but she remembers the people she meets through this campaign, and in our community, with such compassion and empathy it's as if she's known them for years.
Rita's always been willing and eager to help me, our kids, our friends and neighbors, her students and her constituents. She'll work for people in Washington. She'll represent the working people, the farmers, the single parents, and the struggling people. That's why I fell in love with her. And that's why I will always support her. I know she'll take care of the little people.
_She 's the person we need to represent and advocate for the betterment of IA-02 in Congress._
**[Today's Rita's birthday, and I know the best gift you could give her is a donation to her campaign, because to her, being able to serve is the best gift of all. Will you donate $20 today to help me celebrate Rita's birthday?](https://act.myngp.com/el/BelZwRjAOCUDpU1wBZwy4SLlKUK0_fvWqBQx7RCpxv4=/EGzwh-BaieRvkZDmKG9j4gStQXG8ebUQLdpRVD58GgQ=?refcode=200505-email&amount=20)** 🎂🎁🎈
Thanks,
Paul Hart

Not only that, but she remembers the people she meets through this campaign, and in our community, with such compassion and empathy it's as if she's known them for years. Rita's always been willing and eager to help me, our kids, our friends and neighbors, her students and her constituents. She'll work for people in Washington. She'll represent the working people, the farmers, the single parents, and the struggling people. That's why I fell in love with her. And that's why I will always support her. I know she'll take care of the little people. She 's the person we need to represent and advocate for the betterment of IA-02 in Congress. 🎂🎁🎈 Thanks, Paul Hart Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa Rita Hart for Iowa P.O. Box 333 Wheatland IA 52777 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =. ****** ******

name: MJ Hegar
subject: The NRA's puppet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We need a senator who'll prioritize Texans over the NRA.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900dc/7f51f7bc/4ffcbd57/4ef16c33/1238988805/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

It's long past time that the Senate took action to stop the senseless gun violence epidemic. Just weeks after mass shootings in El Paso and Midland-Odessa left dozens dead and many more injured, Senator Cornyn refused to even consider meaningful action on gun safety. Instead, he touts his A rating from the NRA while putting out half-assed legislation. In return, the NRA has spent nearly $80,000 to keep their ally in office. **[Help me get a weak-willed senator who won't say no to the NRA out of office.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900dc/7f51f7bc/4ffcbd57/4ef16c32/1238988805/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-gunsafety?refcode=email_20200505.1nd__1357__&amount=10")**

I'm proud to be endorsed by Brady PAC and Giffords, and to have received the 2020 Moms Demand Action Gun Sense Candidate Distinction for my commitment to making gun safety a top priority in the Senate. As a combat veteran and survivor of gun violence, you can bet I won't sit on my ass while gun violence continues to devastate our communities. I want a country that's safe for my kids, where I don't have to worry about them going to school.

**[Will you pitch in to help us keep building the campaign we need to defeat the NRA's puppet, Sen. Cornyn, and make gun safety legislation a reality?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900dc/7f51f7bc/4ffcbd57/4ef16c32/1238988805/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-gunsafety?refcode=email_20200505.1nd__1357__&amount=10")**

\-- MJ Hegar

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900dc/7f51f7bc/4ffcbd57/4ef16c32/1238988805/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-gunsafety?refcode=email_20200505.1nd__1357__&amount=10")**
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900dc/7f51f7bc/4ffcbd57/4ef16c31/1238988805/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1357&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900dc/7f51f7bc/4ffcbd57/4ef16c30/1238988805/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

Round Rock, TX 78683

Team,

We already knew that Scott Perry’s grip on this toss-up seat was weakening, and now we have more proof: **This morning,_Roll Call_ released their updated 2020 House ratings, and PA-10 was one of only two Republican-held seats on the list that could flip from red to blue this November.** Scott Perry’s radical, far-right agenda doesn’t represent the hard-working people of South Central PA -- and it’s time to send him to an early retirement. body:
Our newest program, In Good Company, is a series of virtual events with some of the most fascinating and respected figures in politics. And, thanks to everyone’s support, the conversations have been so successful we're expanding the series!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17384973/192505712/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzhjYTlhYS0wMDhmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cvDyy-Zywh09C0UCHs0GZvK_80SvxRj6UmF50na9iNc=&emci=64b1bf3e-ef8e-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=8c8ca9aa-008f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644) Hi there,

As we continue shifting to a fully digital campaign, we keep on finding new ways to reach out and interact with our supporters.

Our newest program,_In Good Company_ , is a series of virtual events with some of the most fascinating and respected figures in politics. And, thanks to everyone’s support, the conversations have been so successful, so we're expanding the series!

_Check out our NEW scheduled guests!_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17384974/192505713/121337317?contactdata=72lZdWMpZ9p3o5MaoUjI6d1js4zKL0JYViUHysO4JUwKBDkJmYmDoUGCb6oA6gvKM6Fo8vHV0CtwbzfOxSz8sPbCVkGE6kCH%2FLafFEzTspNLbMc62lKmdx2irSqwWGmfVe4NidzFZIMKJiakYkQ3UQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzhjYTlhYS0wMDhmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cvDyy-Zywh09C0UCHs0GZvK_80SvxRj6UmF50na9iNc=&emci=64b1bf3e-ef8e-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=8c8ca9aa-008f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644) **[Don’t miss out — register for our event tomorrow with Rep. Deb Haaland (and other new guests) now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17384975/192505714/121337317?contactdata=72lZdWMpZ9p3o5MaoUjI6d1js4zKL0JYViUHysO4JUwKBDkJmYmDoUGCb6oA6gvKM6Fo8vHV0CtwbzfOxSz8sPbCVkGE6kCH%2FLafFEzTspNLbMc62lKmdx2irSqwWGmfVe4NidzFZIMKJiakYkQ3UQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzhjYTlhYS0wMDhmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cvDyy-Zywh09C0UCHs0GZvK_80SvxRj6UmF50na9iNc=&emci=64b1bf3e-ef8e-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=8c8ca9aa-008f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644)**

_And if you haven’t already, don’t forget to register and mark your calendars for:_
* Mayor of St. Petersburg, **Rick Kriseman** : May 11th, 2:00PM
* Former Florida CFO and Democratic nominee for Governor, **Alex Sink** : May 18th, 4:30PM
* Congresswoman, **Lois Frankel** : June 2nd, 6:00PM
* State Senator, **Janet Cruz**
* Former Congresswoman and Candidate for Florida Governor, **Gwen Graham**
* Former Governor of Maryland and candidate for President, **Martin O'Malley**

We all wish we could be organizing in the field, but we are so enjoying these exciting and insightful conversations with esteemed leaders, colleagues, and friends as we explore the issues facing our communities, Florida, and our nation.

**[Click here for a complete, up-to-date list of these events and to RSVP now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17384976/192505715/121337317?contactdata=72lZdWMpZ9p3o5MaoUjI6d1js4zKL0JYViUHysO4JUwKBDkJmYmDoUGCb6oA6gvKM6Fo8vHV0CtwbzfOxSz8sPbCVkGE6kCH%2FLafFEzTspNLbMc62lKmdx2irSqwWGmfVe4NidzFZIMKJiakYkQ3UQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzhjYTlhYS0wMDhmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cvDyy-Zywh09C0UCHs0GZvK_80SvxRj6UmF50na9iNc=&emci=64b1bf3e-ef8e-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=8c8ca9aa-008f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644)**

Looking forward to these conversations, Team Good | = | To be removed from this email list, please . PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS Margaret Good for Congress PO Box 5073 Sarasota, FL 34277 United States

name: Ashley Hinson
subject: NEWS FLASH: It's time to shake up DC with some Iowa common sense!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
We know that during these unprecedented times, things are a little hectic. In case you haven't had the chance to donate, we wanted to make sure that you still had the opportunity.
Friend,
**Hi, I 'm Ashley Hinson. I'm reporting live to put an end to the chaos and dysfunction in Washington**.
As a mother of two, I worry about the future of our country and the example that a dysfunctional Congress -- led by Alexandira Ocasio-Cortez and her "Squad" \-- is setting for our children. It's spreading all over the country. In fact, right here in Iowa, career politicians like my opponent, Abby Finkenauer, are throwing away Iowa common sense in favor of all-out government overreach.
So I decided to stop talking about it and do something about it by running for Congress.
Washington is in desperate need of new leaders who are going to work to solve problems. But Abby Finkenauer and other career politicians are only pandering to the far left socialists in Congress, completely disregarding the needs of Iowans.
**NEWS FLASH:** Abby Finkenauer votes _with_ AOC and her "Squad" 91% of the time!
Let me tell you about myself...
I'm not like Abby Finkenauer or any other politician in Washington. I was an award winning news reporter born right here in Iowa, reporting on what Iowans needed to hear to keep their families safe and informed.
But, I knew that I could do more for my community. That's why in 2016 I ran to represent my district in the State House and became the first woman ever to win a traditionally Democratic House seat as a Republican.
As a Representative, I've balanced budgets, improved our schools and worked to grow our economy. As your next Congresswoman, I'll shake up Washington and use Iowa common sense to get Congress back to work for the American people.
But here's the thing...
_**Friend, I can 't do this alone**_. Nancy Pelosi and the far left are already pouring millions of dollars into Iowa to hold onto this district and keep it in Democrat hands.
[_**I need your help to take it back and bring Iowa common sense back to Washington!**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HmxGsH3rl8dRJF5d91SGkvt3HMKUO-KmEF78dq6iilNjy0I8S-rlN5KwJqX2j7kxaE32YqH0oz1oAE6vOOrFjgVI-1uf78tT6XJAnDDp8fQtZPnl_ZfWb7hTo4I7SP4XCtU6Xdi9x1BBUJkVidpJGALLKeIxuPyyxjERIaQ8Uu33_IBGLpOcQnCRutKQiMhaPxYvZfr0YTbov63CHgqfpRbf-rBhqKqN9MduHMM6ocV3eJxoFanTLz4uq2EBC-KlOj_xecBXcHwDCeHWyXlj1y8mV2NQgGAfmedhh2IwkDA9m_-7BJivp33sdLkcLSVMs4-qzAWQx506K6aUv_IFq6pgulDQ-yKJrg1P-0dWCHjosMwuH1RlD_mfIvBZHq_EUgYhtsSaAr8=&c=3OS_hOMeTGMWzITiUfwSpad2C-bdroLO3Y7tJTnbdnGCoLu_HgH79w==&ch=xpFD4hDF6urB6w6j3MGgL1zPvTGtZ03tys1OOxbn2dUE5zhh31SwMA==)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: China's Coronavirus Lies Pile Up
body:
"A Department of Homeland Security analysis has concluded that China hid the early spread of the coronavirus so it could hoard medical equipment." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c158ea3093&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **China's Coronavirus Lies Pile Up**

“A Department of Homeland Security analysis has concluded that China hid the early spread of the coronavirus so it could hoard medical equipment, keeping it from other countries that would have bought it if they had known of the danger that was coming their way from Wuhan,” the _Washington Examiner_ editorial board writes.

“Specifically, DHS found, with 95% statistical confidence, that changes to China's personal protective equipment import and export behavior were highly abnormal and not random.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=425040d9a1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Vice President Mike Pence’s close personal relationship with governors of both parties has been a key to the federal response to the coronavirus pandemic.” Drawing on his experience as a governor, the Vice President hosts regular calls with state leaders to discuss everything from testing to ventilators, Matthew Boyle writes for [_Breitbart_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=13dc26a6ed&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “A steady stream of unflattering revelations, beginning with a report by the Justice Department's inspector general into egregious FISA abuses last December, has relentlessly pounded the reputation of my former agency. Now, further irrefutable proof emerges that a small cabal of FBI headquarters decision-makers was hellbent on undoing a presidency,” former FBI official James Gagliano writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0fbcbc1afc&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| The U.S. bulk-power system “is increasingly a target of foreign adversaries seeking to commit malicious acts, including malicious cyber activities.” President Trump’s latest executive order allows the Department of Energy to swiftly take action to defend our critical power system against these foreign attacks, White House Director of Trade and Manufacturing Policy Peter Navarro writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=00c638d564&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

subject: It's Teacher Appreciation Week! 🍎
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
**Today is National Teachers ' Day!**
It's no surprise that in the midst of our current health crisis, teachers across the country have stepped up to the task of educating and prioritizing our children's wellbeing through online learning and remote instruction.
That's why I want to send a massive THANK YOU to the teachers of California for their hard work and continued dedication to our students.
**[Will you join me by signing our Thank You card?](https://act.myngp.com/el/yMVfAgSXsmDI2HSGbeZ_NPl3ruYuSgnWHzlKl9u8aVs=/7apCNQpY36TZAGGb4Jz0wAuGwGAEiT6rm9Z8FmJapK0=) Your notes of gratitude will be sent to the California Teacher's Association. **
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/yMVfAgSXsmDI2HSGbeZ_NPl3ruYuSgnWHzlKl9u8aVs=/JooZDP78bhi2JTEDvBObS_ny5U-U_JQ4qq4oZCATDwY=)
As a former teacher, I know teaching is a job unlike any other -- it can be taxing _and_ rewarding; draining _and _vitalizing.
A Thank You note is a small way you can show your gratitude for the folks who shape our children's futures day in and day out.
**[Show your support for teachers | SIGN OUR THANK YOU CARD >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/yMVfAgSXsmDI2HSGbeZ_NPl3ruYuSgnWHzlKl9u8aVs=/7apCNQpY36TZAGGb4Jz0wAuGwGAEiT6rm9Z8FmJapK0=)**

Thank you,
\--_Linda S anchez _
**Make sure to forward this email to friends so they have a chance to sign our card too!**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/yMVfAgSXsmDI2HSGbeZ_NPl3ruYuSgnWHzlKl9u8aVs=/MZ3NRtTpSmJLxyJSCnq1ZmaZIX7-Ji5Xa5CicAK8sqg=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/yMVfAgSXsmDI2HSGbeZ_NPl3ruYuSgnWHzlKl9u8aVs=/YG-bAyuqPc5p7gzk510clItls26N9F7MdzfQmF91qVs=)

clean_body: Today is National Teachers ' Day! It's no surprise that in the midst of our current health crisis, teachers across the country have stepped up to the task of educating and prioritizing our children's wellbeing through online learning and remote instruction. That's why I want to send a massive THANK YOU to the teachers of California for their hard work and continued dedication to our students. = Your notes of gratitude will be sent to the California Teacher's Association. = As a former teacher, I know teaching is a job unlike any other -- it can be taxing and rewarding; draining and vitalizing. body:
This might be the best news we’ve heard in a long time.
#
This might be the **best news** we’ve heard in a long time:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17385556/192512073/941701438?refcode=em20200505&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2ZhZWFmMi0wMzhmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OM6hQsxve_EQPkVExmNcx6XENewTz7WXggYSwroGigE=) "An early look at the data finds that **Democrats are the slightest of favorites to take back the Senate.** The chance Democrats net gain at least 3 seats is about 3-in-5 (60%), while the chance they net gain at least 4 seats is about 1-in-2 (50%).”
---
We have a real chance this election to win back a Democratic majority and kick Mitch out of the Senate. _But that doesn’t mean we can take this chance for granted._
**It means we need to work harder than ever these next 7 weeks** so we can reach out to every voter possible and build the grassroots movement we need to defeat Mitch.
**[Will you chip in $5 to support our campaign and join us in making history this election? We want to send a strong message to Mitch and his Republicans colleagues today as they return to the Senate today that their time is up.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17385570/192512126/941701438?refcode=em20200505&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2ZhZWFmMi0wMzhmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OM6hQsxve_EQPkVExmNcx6XENewTz7WXggYSwroGigE=)**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17385572/192512128/941701438?refcode=em20200505&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2ZhZWFmMi0wMzhmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OM6hQsxve_EQPkVExmNcx6XENewTz7WXggYSwroGigE=)
It’s incredibly encouraging to hear news like this, but we still have huge challenges to overcome before we pull this off.
\-- Mitch is investing $67 million in attack ads to protect his Senate majority and his seat.
\-- Voters are hungry for a bold, progressive choice, but there’s still lots of people who don’t know Charles yet that we need to reach out to.
\-- And on top of everything, the establishment is trying to put their thumb on the scales and support a candidate without listening to the interests and needs of Kentuckians.
It’s a lot to overcome — but if we keep organizing, putting our $3, $5, $19 donations together, and growing our volunteer force — we can pull off a grassroots victory this June.
**[Charles doesn’t accept a single cent from corporate PACs or special interests. We’re relying on supporters like you, to help fund our campaign and spread our bold, progressive message. Will you chip in anything you can?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17385573/192512129/941701438?refcode=em20200505&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2ZhZWFmMi0wMzhmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OM6hQsxve_EQPkVExmNcx6XENewTz7WXggYSwroGigE=)**

Team Booker

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: Rebuilding America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Friends- Americans rebuild. New Yorkers rebuild. Nothing can keep us down. After 9/11 we rebuilt. After Hurricane Sandy we rebuilt. After COVID we will rebuild.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=150A202A1A2517)
---
| | |
---
| | Friends-

Americans rebuild. New Yorkers rebuild. Nothing can keep us down.

After 9/11 we rebuilt.

After Hurricane Sandy we rebuilt.

After COVID we will rebuild.

[The people we elect in November will be the people who help us rebuild our communities, restart our economy and restore American jobs.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=150A202A1A2518) So do you want Nancy Pelosi in charge of rebuilding (or destroying) our country?

---
| | |
---
| | [ CHIP IN $5 TO HELP NICOLE ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=150A202A1A2518)
---
| | |
---
| | Do you want Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez to reshape our nation to be a socialist wasteland?

Do you want Illan Omar to bring anti-semitism into our communities?

Do you want Max Rose, who supports closing Rikers Island and bail reform to let criminals into our neighborhoods?

No, no, no, absolutely not. We can stop it, but I need your help right now.

[I’m running for Congress to make sure that Nancy Pelosi, AOC, and all the “no bail” supporting socialists don’t control the future of our city, state, and country. We just can not let that happen.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=150A202A1A2518)

---
| | |
---

---
| | [ CHIP IN $15 ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=150A202A1A2520)
---
| | [ CHIP IN $25 ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=150A202A1A2521)
---
| | | [ CHIP IN $50 ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=150A202A1A2522)
---
| | [ CHIP IN $100 ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=150A202A1A2523)
---
| | [ OTHER ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=150A202A1A2518)
---
| | |
---
| | I’m not backing down, I’m going to keep fighting. [Join me.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=150A202A1A2518)

Sincerely,

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathy=20Tall?=
subject: Your weekly update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
Thank you for helping to make this last week a success for our campaign! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9fc4ac59bf7e/your-weekly-update?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
**Hello, amazing Dani for Illinois volunteers!** **From all of us here at #TeamDani, I hope you had a great weekend and are staying healthy. If you are in need of any community resources or support during this crisis, do not hesitate to reach out.** **As always, thank you all SO MUCH for your incredible work this week and for your support of the campaign. As we do every week, check out some highlights and reminders below:**
* **In April alone, we completed calls to almost 11,000 voters in the 16th District, 2,000 just in the last week!**
* **HUGE shoutout to Dave and Mary for taking on almost 2,700 of those dials themselves in April. We really couldn’t do it without you, rockstars!**
* **We have sent out 1,900 postcards to volunteer writers all throughout the District to engage voters and, of course, #SaveUSPS!**
* **We now have 23 interns on our team - shoutout to the youth vote!**
* **We had an amazing first Virtual Meet and Greet last night with supporters from all over the country, some IL16 volunteers and some brand new folks who got the chance to learn about this powerhouse campaign. Stay tuned for more soon!**

**A few reminders:**

* **Everyone within the sound of my voice (or email, or Facebook, or text...) is an activist waiting to be engaged - that means that we all have activist friends. If anyone you know is starting to get itchy to make a difference, send them our way! **

* **If you are interested in hosting a Virtual House Party for Dani, reach out to Marguerite at[marguerite@daniforillinois.com](mailto:marguerite@daniforillinois.com). We will walk you through it, we just need you to invite your friends and pour yourself your happy hour drink of choice!**

**New feature: Volunteer Voice! The guest columnist this week is our incredible volunteer leader, Dave Klepitsch.** _**“When phonebanking for Dani, I have run into a few names that I believe I need help with pronunciation when the name pops up on the screen. I simply keep an additional tab open on my computer when calling so I have quick access to this helpful and free website...”**_
_**Howtopronounce.com, sample my last name: Klepitsch**_ _**[https://www.howtopronounce.com/klepitsch](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=526dbdfffc&e=140a9b81e7)**_
_**Another option is Synonyms.com, sample Brzozowski **_ _**[https://www.synonyms.com/pronounce/Brzozowski](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=c2d43793af&e=140a9b81e7)**_ **Thanks for that tip Dave! I will certainly remember that the next time I have a challenge on the screen! ** **Again, from all of us on #TeamDani, thank you! Keep up the good work, let’s flip this seat together.** **Kathy Tall** **Deputy Field Director**
---
| | | | | | | [](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=12de5d2bab&e=140a9b81e7)
---
| | [](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=8773e0d47f&e=140a9b81e7)
---
| | [](daniforillinois.com)
---
|
---
| | Paid for by Dani for Illinois
---
|

**Our mailing address is:**
Dani for Illinois
PO Box 1671
LaSalle, IL 61301

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=7369c912a5&e=140a9b81e7) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=7369c912a5&e=140a9b81e7&c=49d6df5804).

---
