name: Team Marsha
subject: Good News and Bad News
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee
body:
We just saw the most recent fundraising reports from April and it's looking like the Democrats, with the help of their ultra-liberal mega-donors, outraised Republicans.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, click [here.](http://targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/SubscriptionCenter/BlackburnSubscriptionCenter?spMailingID=42429046&spUserID=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&spJobID=MTc2MDQyNjQ4MwS2&spReportId=MTc2MDQyNjQ4MwS2)
****
****
__
Peter,

We've got some good news and some bad news.

The bad news is that we just saw the most recent fundraising reports from April and it's looking like the Democrats, with the help of their ultra-liberal mega-donors, outraised Republicans.

The good news is that to help Republicans get ahead, Marsha has _**extended the fundraising deadline** _and _**increased matching to 500%**_ through **MIDNIGHT** tonight!

Peter, conservatives need your help.

We need your help to fight back against the Left's partisan games and charades, including the latest witch hunt led by Nancy Pelosi.

We need your help to fight back against Chuck Schumer and his socialist wish list as he continues to punt on relief for businesses and hardworking Americans.

Marsha's hoping to raise at least another $10,000 before our midnight deadline in order to help ensure Republicans have the resources necessary to take on the Left. _Can she count on you?___

**[CHIP IN $100](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0MjkwNDYS1&kn=15&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDQyNjQ4MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[CHIP IN $50](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0MjkwNDYS1&kn=2&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDQyNjQ4MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[CHIP IN $25](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0MjkwNDYS1&kn=7&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDQyNjQ4MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[CHIP IN $10](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0MjkwNDYS1&kn=3&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDQyNjQ4MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
[**CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0MjkwNDYS1&kn=9&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDQyNjQ4MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: House DFL Team
subject: Investing in Minnesotans
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/mXKM6-93KIuwBE-QaU4-w7536O0AltGFIB4D10edzPY=/GLgD4P7mLVJ74nl_mPFnnyv0TVg4ASTERSW5GFnqkrE=?refcode=050520)
| | Friend, Today the state of Minnesota released an economic forecast that predicts a budget deficit for the next year.
We know the Republican playbook: [they proposed painful cuts](https://act.myngp.com/el/mXKM6-93KIuwBE-QaU4-w7536O0AltGFIB4D10edzPY=/NRA79QUolqhssCYz13q01V9acwIZzt5uJkidGhvI2bI=) to Minnesotans' health care, education, and economic security by giving away over $1 billion in tax cuts, largely to those that don't need them.
We are grateful to have a DFL Majority in the Minnesota House to stop their dangerous plans that will only make the problem worse.
Now is the time to invest in Minnesotans, not turn our backs on them.
* Keeping Minnesotans safe in their homes with a $100 million investment in housing assistance
* Providing economic security for our education professionals by ensuring full pay for our hourly school employees
* Keeping Minnesotans connected by ensuring all Minnesotans have access to the broadband they need to go online
* Delivering on our promise to the Minnesotans who keep our state going by ratifying state contracts
* Passing a robust bonding and infrastructure package that focuses on building our economy and getting Minnesotans back to work

We will get through this by investing in our people, in our state, and in a better future for all of us, not by cutting the state services designed to give Minnesotans economic security and keep us safe. Thank you, House DFL Team [_P.S. In Minnesota you can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be**completely refunded** to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund program._](https://act.myngp.com/el/mXKM6-93KIuwBE-QaU4-w7536O0AltGFIB4D10edzPY=/GLgD4P7mLVJ74nl_mPFnnyv0TVg4ASTERSW5GFnqkrE=?refcode=050520) [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/mXKM6-93KIuwBE-QaU4-w7536O0AltGFIB4D10edzPY=/GLgD4P7mLVJ74nl_mPFnnyv0TVg4ASTERSW5GFnqkrE=?refcode=050520)

body:

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ngQtQNNXaYI8jP6-Tz_8Cs_62aX3QQeNi_wyfxl8vfuIhezklHmUOC-XfErbqipbUrW9IcDjqxTDyOyBp8oKowWZkQBeG-EMuS-DUa7iEsi2ysP-TofxAYLAyLbI-yU18gAodnasx1XdVKy2A5Jj_r_uyBQCgj5fi6pQpxn2aH0yFgd_do2w7-w4A0Qw2U9ua_I9Hyj1t7ZDXQCjnTbb2OfEGP6rY3CgnKXdfAia82YW6s6axkOsqHTT-XOT1dECPWB433rfQ5MJ6DVRcS0JPyZQq5JpfruuWIjAsC8WMRdH7fjYta4qBtoVDpo915T7nra2YsjwH1DGJM-jYbNACz8s30a66b1R6zrcJql88qhhIAHkuaTf3B-i_7T3zpjVuRgwsciGrbslksorRmEGzw==&c=Q2LTtnAB5S5UkJufR8HfCSROcibVZktTxnyd_7BwBVkamz307VNupw==&ch=O7_hLGsq9A66_uNm4XyjqgrriGQQgts4fAvcEOvLQlAZVDfLqTCPiQ==)

Mitch McConnell

name: Booker HQ
subject: May Senate priorities survey -- need a response from you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
We really value your opinion! |
#
Friends -- The last several weeks have been difficult for so many. Cory has been working as hard as he can in the Senate to ensure you and your family have the support you need during these tough times. As the Senate officially goes back into session this week, it's important to him that we hear directly from you. So, we're kicking off May by inviting 2,500 of our top supporters (that's you!) to take our **Official Campaign Priorities Survey**. [**Click here to get started. It 's important to Cory to get your feedback and it will only take a few minutes (we promise!) >>**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/2020-may-survey?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&ampCity=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+to+get+started+Itrsquos+impor&utm_campaign=em200505-survey&source=em200505-survey") | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/2020-may-survey?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=2+-+TAKE+THE+SURVEY&utm_campaign=em200505-survey&source=em200505-survey")
---
Cory is fighting harder than ever to find solutions to the problems facing the American people. But to advocate for these issues and policies, he needs to hear from you directly.
We'll be reviewing the responses to this survey and forwarding your feedback and ideas to Cory before the week is over. **Please make sure to complete this survey by midnight tonight.**
We appreciate your time!
Booker HQ
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/2020-may-survey?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=3+-+TAKE+THE+SURVEY&utm_campaign=em200505-survey&source=em200505-survey")

---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17387001/192548429/1525071316?contactdata=WfeZITVlK9GpHd%2B%2F3DkSSeQVFU2LLFbPOv8xsI1NFqc1rrxiThYLdqQB69qfIbAj8PU%2Fz8S5ETRLCaCsPiZvVrQHyVzNQEep78ElxtM9FBIJVkW85x6voZ%2Fpns966rCDqKb6JVCqKhDvb%2F9ivljx33Ra%2FLT8exqK%2B3H4WrEXFE4%3D&quick=true&ms=em050520-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODA5NzFlYi0xMjhmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aOFmqilv-T5dUpgxGKiKQnTVGxut4DMC1hdqkeGPqB8=&emci=c50971eb-128f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=c80971eb-128f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=463701) **** | | Friend, in Sunday’s televised debate I once again voiced my strong support for the Green New Deal. Unfortunately, not every Democrat in the debate with me agreed — **so I want to hear from you.**

**[Take this one question survey to let me know where you stand on supporting the Green New Deal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17387002/192548430/1525071316?contactdata=WfeZITVlK9GpHd%2B%2F3DkSSeQVFU2LLFbPOv8xsI1NFqc1rrxiThYLdqQB69qfIbAj8PU%2Fz8S5ETRLCaCsPiZvVrQHyVzNQEep78ElxtM9FBIJVkW85x6voZ%2Fpns966rCDqKb6JVCqKhDvb%2F9ivljx33Ra%2FLT8exqK%2B3H4WrEXFE4%3D&quick=true&ms=em050520&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODA5NzFlYi0xMjhmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aOFmqilv-T5dUpgxGKiKQnTVGxut4DMC1hdqkeGPqB8=&emci=c50971eb-128f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=c80971eb-128f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=463701)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17387003/192548431/1525071316?contactdata=WfeZITVlK9GpHd%2B%2F3DkSSeQVFU2LLFbPOv8xsI1NFqc1rrxiThYLdqQB69qfIbAj8PU%2Fz8S5ETRLCaCsPiZvVrQHyVzNQEep78ElxtM9FBIJVkW85x6voZ%2Fpns966rCDqKb6JVCqKhDvb%2F9ivljx33Ra%2FLT8exqK%2B3H4WrEXFE4%3D&quick=true&ms=em050520&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODA5NzFlYi0xMjhmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aOFmqilv-T5dUpgxGKiKQnTVGxut4DMC1hdqkeGPqB8=&emci=c50971eb-128f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=c80971eb-128f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=463701) In our debates, the candidates have been asked a simple yes or no question: Do you support the Green New Deal. My answer is simple: Yes. **To meet the scale of our environmental and economic crises, we need to act with urgency and boldness. The Green New Deal will create jobs and invest in a clean energy infrastructure that will remake our economy for the 21st century and save the planet.** Unfortunately, not all of my opponents agree.

I’ve already been attacked for supporting the Green New Deal by the Georgia Action Fund, the Super PAC supporting David Perdue, and the conservative _Washington Free Beacon_ newspaper. They say I’ve been “caught on camera” supporting this policy, apparently overlooking the fact that we’ve released our own campaign videos supporting it.

**I’m not running away from this issue because David Perdue and his billionaire backers attack me for it. As Democrats, we need to fight for the bold policies and values we believe in.**

If any of my opponents can’t voice a simple “yes” in support of the Green New Deal in a Democratic debate, imagine what they’d do in the face of Republican attacks.

**That’s why it’s important that we nominate someone who won’t be bullied by the Republican Party when faced with an issue as existential as climate crisis.**

**[So if you haven’t already, share your thoughts with me to let me know where you stand.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17387004/192548432/1525071316?contactdata=WfeZITVlK9GpHd%2B%2F3DkSSeQVFU2LLFbPOv8xsI1NFqc1rrxiThYLdqQB69qfIbAj8PU%2Fz8S5ETRLCaCsPiZvVrQHyVzNQEep78ElxtM9FBIJVkW85x6voZ%2Fpns966rCDqKb6JVCqKhDvb%2F9ivljx33Ra%2FLT8exqK%2B3H4WrEXFE4%3D&quick=true&ms=em050520&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODA5NzFlYi0xMjhmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aOFmqilv-T5dUpgxGKiKQnTVGxut4DMC1hdqkeGPqB8=&emci=c50971eb-128f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=c80971eb-128f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=463701)**
Thank you,
Teresa ****

name: Mark Warner for Senate
subject: SIGN ON: Protect Americans' health data.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Jared Kushner is spearheading a Trump administration program to collect and share Americans' private health information during the COVID-19 pandemic.
|
---
| | **Tell the Trump Administration:
Protect our private health information** **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4dc/53d9897e/54f6c01d/1c886cce/3619173115/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-healthdata")** Derek --

**Jared Kushner is spearheading a Trump administration program to collect and share Americans ' private health information during the COVID-19 pandemic. **They are doing this without the consent of patients or doctors and are refusing to share even basic information about the program with the public. Simply put, without more information, this looks like a clear violation of our privacy.

**[Will you add your name right now to demand that the Trump administration protect Americans' private health data?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4dc/53d9897e/54f6c01d/1c886cce/3619173115/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-healthdata")**

Mark and two of his Democratic colleagues in Congress recently sent a letter to the president's son-in-law to express deep concern about the potential privacy challenges this program could pose. They asked for answers to critically important questions about how data will be collected and used, including:
* What does this program aim to accomplish?
* When will the federal government stop collecting and sharing health data with the private sector for the public health surveillance initiative?
* What steps has the Administration taken to adhere to the Privacy Act, which limits the federal government's authority to collect personal data from third parties and imposes numerous other privacy safeguards?

So far, neither Mr. Kushner nor anyone in the Trump administration has responded, leaving us in the dark about critical details of the program.

Mark is a longtime advocate for patient privacy and has insisted that existing privacy laws be updated to keep up with advances in technology. He will continue to work hard to ensure that our rights are protected and to demand transparency from this administration.

**[ADD YOUR NAME: Tell the Trump administration to take every necessary step to protect our private information.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4dc/53d9897e/54f6c01d/1c886cce/3619173115/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-healthdata")**

Thank you,

Team Warner
| **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4dc/53d9897e/54f6c01d/1c886ccd/3619173115/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU1MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200505a_p_1_fl__550__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4dc/53d9897e/54f6c01d/1c886ccc/3619173115/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
---

name: Team Sri
subject: What's on your mind?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/VNZsbqQOq7N1gRW_DFGMgBwXG06n04pza93o-uHSuq4=/IHEynBSHivkHtG_Hxd3lIf1hEG1kqwPATISSVz49TnU=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.05.05_TS_b1_all&amount=15)
---
| _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you 'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://act.myngp.com/el/VNZsbqQOq7N1gRW_DFGMgBwXG06n04pza93o-uHSuq4=/NybEUjMnqSQxWVY52YrhMgPqTzygANmalk1elcJjE78=) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

* * *

Team -

As we begin a new month, we wanted to take a minute to get some feedback on the issues that are currently top of mind for our supporters.

We're not interested in hot-takes or singular media narratives. We want to know what real people on the ground in our communities are facing and how we can better tool our campaign to address these needs.

So if you have a second, please take a moment to give a response to our one-click poll below. Your feedback makes us better.

Thank you.

-Team Sri
**May 2020 One-Click Survey
What is the number one issue on your mind?** | [The need for vote-by-mail »](https://act.myngp.com/el/VNZsbqQOq7N1gRW_DFGMgBwXG06n04pza93o-uHSuq4=/uMXCURl-aivaXt1r_YWyD3Zu9Pxj3jwwnAYP_6LoQVs=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.05.05_TS_b1_all_VBM&amount=5)

[Access to affordable quality health care »](https://act.myngp.com/el/VNZsbqQOq7N1gRW_DFGMgBwXG06n04pza93o-uHSuq4=/uMXCURl-aivaXt1r_YWyD3Zu9Pxj3jwwnAYP_6LoQVs=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.05.05_TS_b1_all_hc&amount=5)
[Rebuilding our crumbling infrastructure »](https://act.myngp.com/el/VNZsbqQOq7N1gRW_DFGMgBwXG06n04pza93o-uHSuq4=/uMXCURl-aivaXt1r_YWyD3Zu9Pxj3jwwnAYP_6LoQVs=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.05.05_TS_b1_all_rebuild&amount=5)
[Fighting COVID-19 related misinformation »](https://act.myngp.com/el/VNZsbqQOq7N1gRW_DFGMgBwXG06n04pza93o-uHSuq4=/uMXCURl-aivaXt1r_YWyD3Zu9Pxj3jwwnAYP_6LoQVs=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.05.05_TS_b1_all_misinfo&amount=5)
[Global unrest and America's worldwide standing »](https://act.myngp.com/el/VNZsbqQOq7N1gRW_DFGMgBwXG06n04pza93o-uHSuq4=/uMXCURl-aivaXt1r_YWyD3Zu9Pxj3jwwnAYP_6LoQVs=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.05.05_TS_b1_all_unrest&amount=5)

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/VNZsbqQOq7N1gRW_DFGMgBwXG06n04pza93o-uHSuq4=/IHEynBSHivkHtG_Hxd3lIf1hEG1kqwPATISSVz49TnU=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.05.05_TS_b1_all&amount=15)

**Sri Preston Kulkarni** is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he'll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | [Help send Sri to Congress! ➜](https://act.myngp.com/el/VNZsbqQOq7N1gRW_DFGMgBwXG06n04pza93o-uHSuq4=/IHEynBSHivkHtG_Hxd3lIf1hEG1kqwPATISSVz49TnU=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.05.05_TS_b1_all&amount=15)

name: Brandon, Team Christy
subject: If we're going to overcome Trump's tidal wave of support, we need to hit our $1 million goal and unleash a wave of digital activism of our own.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter,

With just a week to go and national attention turning towards our race, we've got some good, some bad, and some ugly news.

**The Good:** Up until now, we were neck and neck with Garcia on the airwaves.

**The Bad:** Donald Trump and his online army of supporters are dumping money in Garcia's campaign war chest, and he just placed a massive $292,084 TV buy.

**The Ugly:** With Garcia's new buy, total spending on his behalf is up to a jaw-dropping $2.7 million -- with more expected to come through. And right now, we're not prepared to match Garcia's spending, not with Trump raising all this money on his behalf.

**[If we're going to overcome Trump's tidal wave of support, we need to hit our $1 million goal and unleash a wave of digital activism of our own. Can you chip in $5 or more to help do it?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb10/29776869/a7b146f/569f08b6/4271025530/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDVfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw5LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200505_milliongoal9-full")**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb10/29776869/a7b146f/569f08b7/4271025530/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDVfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw5LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200505_milliongoal9-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb10/29776869/a7b146f/569f08b0/4271025530/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDVfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw5LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200505_milliongoal9-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb10/29776869/a7b146f/569f08b1/4271025530/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDVfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw5LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200505_milliongoal9-full&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb10/29776869/a7b146f/569f08b2/4271025530/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDVfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw5LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200505_milliongoal9-full&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb10/29776869/a7b146f/569f08b3/4271025530/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDVfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw5LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200505_milliongoal9-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb10/29776869/a7b146f/569f08b6/4271025530/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDVfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw5LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200505_milliongoal9-full")
This goal is steep, but it's what we need to defend this seat and protect our majority in the House. Luckily, Team Christy has grown a lot since we announced our goal.

Hillary Clinton, Elizabeth Warren, Pete Buttigieg, Kamala Harris, Amy Klobuchar, and so many more have joined our race against Donald Trump and Mike Garcia.

**That's because this race is so important to our majority and the wellbeing of our nation.**

**[If you can, chip in $5, or whatever you can afford, to hit our goal and defend this battleground district.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb10/29776869/a7b146f/569f08b6/4271025530/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDVfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw5LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200505_milliongoal9-full")**
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb10/29776869/a7b146f/569f08b6/4271025530/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDVfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw5LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200505_milliongoal9-full")
Thank you,

Brandon

Brandon Zavala
Campaign Manager, Christy for Congress
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb10/29776869/a7b146f/569f08b6/4271025530/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDVfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw5LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200505_milliongoal9-full")

Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._

name: David Hill
subject: Only 6 Months Away
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAVID HILL FOR OKLAHOMA, INC | | [](http://links
body:
We are officially six months away from the general election! Dear Peter, We are officially **six months away** from the general election! I would like to thank you for all of your hard work so far. As you know, we have a tough battle ahead of us as we work to replace Kendra Horn and fire Nancy Pelosi. _**It’s officially crunch time!**_ [ ** DONATE HERE** ](http://links.oklahomaforhill.com/u/click?_t=3f8f472f46d84bffaa7cbc7593ac1005&_m=9e5b48bab5544a77839066ab7580d5fb&_e=3_c-XaX-Wj2Ih_ABIrlYh_pvDAmwVj_s0mSrUum2SB2Bqs8E6AF5-LQKBdXycgeoyn1APzUxxZNe61CAEHzSqKfHmNL4djtx09wvdT9QAsy0gdF6EtblF22T3Qt5IYvIM-4aIQylq9MDTfIbtEwzN-9owhWUhQmHDwl2UbcO5k5XwQHST8NMyn7ZGszySNvUsbbz9UpnrMm7OCbB51RZTbgG1Wle5k1AvnYiHd7Fjuu1feJ80z-dxHzGf5oMFf8NvQuiMHnQA4Sx2_bxxF9Z0PDmk7MblUcZ8CCGMDIDrQIaoIr71DFQTXs7jjii2x2MXjBEczRIbq-h44pJIU0pzHWV4nMW-xcU6mRqlFKRUS0FUzUWJ1IT24OawYQlfBttnOrEALrfv-0Mwxja0n5RmA%3D%3D) Since the beginning of 2018, Nancy Pelosi and Kendra Horn’s do-nothing agenda has not changed. They have spent the entire 116th Congress on a liberal plot to take down our president based on blatantly false accusations. And when they aren’t “busy” wasting taxpayer dollars with their political games, they’re attempting to advance dangerous socialist policies like the Green New Deal, even in the midst of a public health pandemic. **Our country desperately needs to move away from this toxic form of politics and toward a direction guided by the people.** [ **Join our fight to today - Let's Take Back the House!** ](http://links.oklahomaforhill.com/u/click?_t=3f8f472f46d84bffaa7cbc7593ac1005&_m=9e5b48bab5544a77839066ab7580d5fb&_e=3_c-XaX-Wj2Ih_ABIrlYh_pvDAmwVj_s0mSrUum2SB2Bqs8E6AF5-LQKBdXycgeoyn1APzUxxZNe61CAEHzSqKfHmNL4djtx09wvdT9QAsy0gdF6EtblF22T3Qt5IYvIM-4aIQylq9MDTfIbtEwzN-9owhWUhQmHDwl2UbcO5k5XwQHST8NMyn7ZGszySNvU7vg2D_kJ_jFf5lLMcX-NCN9pHIcojxMF92tPxUi9PVB7SxASE2R0hKSHGUJ6JBgoZX0uvXP6w3XBT-seqxCXR7y3Cm_8G-adG2gsXnNeErWxQOfTyQAhtTlkxQurxxzvcEa2QnanCiplZHl8LUWB7v8vQjZuKs5PVztexcsEPmUyluQkhBizVv0SpZw7MWAjXPpxEd5exw9-OFathKDMkA%3D%3D) According to news reports from this past week, the Democrats may be attempting to get Hillary Clinton on the ballot again. Hillary Clinton would be a disaster as president. Liberals like Hillary Clinton and Kendra Horn must be stopped. **Enough with the politicians and their political games.** **Our mission is clear: Defeat Kendra Horn, fire Nancy Pelosi, and support President Trump.** We are working hard to achieve this reality, but we can’t do it without your support.

| Hello, team! Since day one, our campaign has been built on getting out, talking to residents of the 6th District, and working with local leaders to build real solutions to move Kentucky forward. Even though we're safe at home, we're proud to continue the conversation. **You can join Josh and a special guest tonight on Facebook Live. Here are the details** :
* **WHO** : Josh Hicks (candidate for KY-6), Rep. Cherlynn Stevenson (KY HD-88), and you!
* **WHAT** : A discussion on the recent Kentucky legislative session, and the Commonwealth's response to COVID-19.
* **WHERE** : On Josh’s Facebook page — _**[facebook.com/JoshHicksKY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17388320/192573918/316750889?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzA4NDRmZi0xZDhmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nLyDPo75EpOa0OPEz_bPLNB6mwX491sg-VNCb6U0Yf0=&emci=c05599e9-108f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=0c0844ff-1d8f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=15601662)**_. Like Josh’s page now and you’ll get a notification when he goes live.
* **WHEN: **Tonight, May 5, at 7PM ET on Facebook Live

If you have a question for Josh or Cherlynn, you can submit it by replying to this email with your question, or leave a comment on the Facebook Live video once the event begins. And if you miss it -- don't worry! You can watch the Facebook Live recording at any time on our Facebook page. Hadley Rouse

clean_body: Josh is holding a Facebook Live discussion on healthcare tonight at 7PM ET, and we wanted to share the event information with you so you could join in! | | Hello, team! Since day one, our campaign has been built on getting out, talking to residents of the 6th District, and working with local leaders to build real solutions to move Kentucky forward. Even though we're safe at home, we're proud to continue the conversation. You can join Josh and a special guest tonight on Facebook Live. Here are the details : WHO : Josh Hicks (candidate for KY-6), Rep. Cherlynn Stevenson (KY HD-88), and you! WHAT : A discussion on the recent Kentucky legislative session, and the Commonwealth's response to COVID-19. WHERE : On Josh’s Facebook page — . Like Josh’s page now and you’ll get a notification when he goes live. WHEN: Tonight, May 5, at 7PM ET on Facebook Live If you have a question for Josh or Cherlynn, you can submit it by replying to this email with your question, or leave a comment on the Facebook Live video once the event begins. And if you miss it -- don't worry! You can watch the Facebook Live recording at any time on our Facebook page. Hadley Rouse Political Coordinator Josh Hicks for Congress | | | * | | = Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress Josh Hicks for Congress PO Box 1214 Lexington, KY 40588 United States Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington. Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney. He’s running to represent hardworking, everyday Kentuckians. Not corporations. name: Tina Smith
subject: Elizabeth Warren
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Families in America already faced a serious childcare crisis before the coronavirus pandemic. Now, businesses have closed their doors and folks across the country are staying home to slow the spread of the coronavirus — pushing childcare providers and working families to the absolute brink as they deal with this economic burden. The coronavirus pandemic could destroy America’s childcare system. My good friend, Elizabeth Warren, and I have a plan to stop it from collapsing altogether. As moms, we know there is no issue more important than making sure our kids are taken care of. **That’s why we are calling for a $50 billion investment to stabilize the childcare system, keep providers in business, and ensure parents can go back to work when it is safe to do so.** **[I’m asking you to join Elizabeth Warren and me in the fight to protect our childcare system and support working families. This is personal for me and I need your help. Add your name today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17388984/192590943/1000235858?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmE1YjcwYy0yNjhmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R8RWpgiYS_IXVUOj_mIG4cxR43-AstovZfHBd1-cofs=&emci=51a5b70c-268f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=52a5b70c-268f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6227932)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17388985/192590944/1000235858?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmE1YjcwYy0yNjhmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R8RWpgiYS_IXVUOj_mIG4cxR43-AstovZfHBd1-cofs=&emci=51a5b70c-268f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=52a5b70c-268f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6227932)
---
As the government provides hundreds of billions of dollars in funding to support small businesses and laid-off workers, we must not forget about our childcare system. Otherwise, we risk the entire system collapsing.
When the time comes, we will not be able to rebuild our economy if this country’s childcare system has collapsed. That’s why we must support our childcare providers throughout this crisis and beyond. It’s the only way to ensure families can access affordable care once the economy reopens.
Thank you, as always, for taking action.
— Tina
Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
---
Tina Smith for Minnesota
PO Box 14362
St. Paul, MN 55114
United States

name: BookerForKentucky.com
subject: Here's our deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Our campaign, this movement, is all about bold, progressive change.
#
This movement that we're building together has always been about people like you – hardworking, everyday Americans who have been left behind and hurt by the policies and poor leadership of Mitch McConnell.
The stakes have never been higher as Mitch reaches for his sixth re-election to the Senate. Especially now, in the midst of the COVID-19 crisis, it's clear that people are hungry for bold, progressive change.
If we want to build the diverse, grassroots movement we need to defeat Mitch, we need to speak to that hunger. And that is what this movement is all about.
**[If you're already bought in, can you chip in $5 to help make our platform a reality?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17389052/192592312/941701439?refcode=em20200505-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjlhMjhhYS0yNjhmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L3hY4olPH6piFe6qKahJB3_p_AqNTji4GKrcl-6CJgA=)** If not, please continue reading.
**[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17389053/192592313/941701439?refcode=em20200505-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjlhMjhhYS0yNjhmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L3hY4olPH6piFe6qKahJB3_p_AqNTji4GKrcl-6CJgA=)**
Since Day 1, our campaign has fought for:
* **Medicare for All.** Not just for people who are at the age of 65, or 60, or 50, but for all people of all ages.
* **A Green New Deal.** Addressing the climate crisis with housing justice, guaranteed union jobs, and direct community investment.
* **Establishing a Universal Basic Income** to put an end to the structures of our economy – including structural racism – that keep people in poverty.
* **Free college and relieving student debt.** Charles and his wife are also affected by impossible amounts of student debt, and he is committed to ensuring that income isn't a barrier to advancing one's education.
* **And more.** All these things that we're fighting for have been shaped by our conversations with voters all across Kentucky and Charles' lived experiences growing up in one of Kentucky's poorest ZIP codes.

People across Kentucky and all over the nation are ready for real, progressive change. Middle-of-the-road "Democratic" policies and candidates just aren't going to cut it.
We have a real chance this election to win back a Democratic majority and kick Mitch out of the Senate – but first, we need to win the Democratic primary on June 23.
**[We can't take this chance for granted. Chip in $5, $15, or whatever else you can afford to our bold, progressive movement – and help us get one step closer to kicking Mitch out.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17389067/192592327/941701439?refcode=em20200505-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjlhMjhhYS0yNjhmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L3hY4olPH6piFe6qKahJB3_p_AqNTji4GKrcl-6CJgA=)**

clean_body: Our campaign, this movement, is all about bold, progressive change. This movement that we're building together has always been about people like you – hardworking, everyday Americans who have been left behind and hurt by the policies and poor leadership of Mitch McConnell. The stakes have never been higher as Mitch reaches for his sixth re-election to the Senate. Especially now, in the midst of the COVID-19 crisis, it's clear that people are hungry for bold, progressive change. If we want to build the diverse, grassroots movement we need to defeat Mitch, we need to speak to that hunger. And that is what this movement is all about. = If not, please continue reading. = Since Day 1, our campaign has fought for: Medicare for All. Not just for people who are at the age of 65, or 60, or 50, but for all people of all ages. A Green New Deal. Addressing the climate crisis with housing justice, guaranteed union jobs, and direct community investment. Establishing a Universal Basic Income to put an end to the structures of our economy – including structural racism – that keep people in poverty. Free college and relieving student debt. Charles and his wife are also affected by impossible amounts of student debt, and he is committed to ensuring that income isn't a barrier to advancing one's education. And more. All these things that we're fighting for have been shaped by our conversations with voters all across Kentucky and Charles' lived experiences growing up in one of Kentucky's poorest ZIP codes. People across Kentucky and all over the nation are ready for real, progressive change. Middle-of-the-road "Democratic" policies and candidates just aren't going to cut it. We have a real chance this election to win back a Democratic majority and kick Mitch out of the Senate – but first, we need to win the Democratic primary on June 23. = = — Team Booker =** | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

subject: What is China hiding?

body:
Last night, I joined Fox News to discuss my work to hold the murderous Chinese Communist Party accountable. China is a pariah state and has been acting like a hostile regime for decades. The Chinese Communist Party is hiding key information and data that would help the world understand the origins of the virus.Click here to unsubscribe http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42430756&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDQzNzYyMQS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,

Despite the propaganda from the Chinese Communist Party and the corrupt World Health Organization, the evidence continues to grow that this virus originated in a laboratory near Wuhan, China.

Our relationship with China will never be the same and we need to ensure they are held accountable for their actions that led to this global pandemic.

body:
One of the qualities that sets Justin apart in Washington is his consistency. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/amashforamerica/an-amash-presidency?e=b1055dcfe8)
---
| | [ ](https://amashforamerica.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a50869b1d817b7ebb49c6b579&id=df1de563c5&e=b1055dcfe8)
---
| |

One of the qualities that sets Justin apart in Washington is his consistency.

While other members of Congress abandoned their principles after being sworn into office or after the White House changed hands, Justin's votes remained grounded in the same set of principles he brought to Congress nine years ago: **securing individual rights, protecting liberty, and ensuring equality under the law.**

**That's why you can trust him to bring those same principles to the White House.**

But what does that mean in practice?

It means...
* stopping policies that violate civil liberties, like civil asset forfeiture and indefinite detention
* ending wars if Congress won't authorize them, and bringing our troops home
* refusing to sign omnibus spending bills that will pile more debt onto the next generation
* ending mass surveillance and vetoing bills that reauthorize the Patriot Act
* rejecting bills filled with earmarks or cronyist handouts to industry
* demanding serious reforms to rein in our massive, unjust criminal justice system

**It means bringing the government back to its most important role: protecting your rights.**

These priorities have been the focus of Justin's entire career in Congress, and it's what this campaign is going to be about.

After more than 6,000 votes in Congress, we know what Justin stands for. While other candidates have had to distance themselves from their records or try to explain away their contradictions, Justin has been able to stand by his record because he never abandoned the principles he ran on.

Each of Justin's votes has been driven by his focus on defending liberty and securing rights, and it's these same priorities that will drive his presidency.

[**Give now to be a part of the movement that is making these goals a reality.**](https://amashforamerica.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a50869b1d817b7ebb49c6b579&id=cf02a1508b&e=b1055dcfe8)

name: Team Warner
subject: Mark your calendars: Online Town Hall this Thursday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---
| | Derek --

Coronavirus is front of mind for folks these days. Just because we're physically distancing doesn't mean we can't talk to one another -- or to our elected officials.

Senator Mark Warner is holding another Facebook Live Town Hall for his constituents in Northern Virginia on **Thursday, May 7th**. There, he'll answer your questions and talk about what he's been working on in the Senate to protect all Virginians during this outbreak. All are welcome to join! Here are the details: | **Facebook Live Town Hall with Senator Mark Warner**
Thursday, May 7, 2020
6:30 PM ET
**[Click here to RSVP](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4de/53d9897e/54f7347e/1c886fb1/555232930/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.mobilize.us/vavictory/event/271731/")**
---
Although this event is hosted on Facebook, you do **not** need a Facebook account to access the town hall. If you already have a question for Mark, please respond directly to this email -- he'll answer as many as possible during the broadcast. You can also ask questions during the broadcast using the comment feature. He's looking forward to updating everyone on what he's been working on and making sure his constituents have the resources and information they need.

We hope you'll join us on Thursday! **[Click here to sign up.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4de/53d9897e/54f7347e/1c886fb1/555232930/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.mobilize.us/vavictory/event/271731/")**

Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner

|
---

[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4de/53d9897e/54f7347e/1c886fb0/555232930/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com") Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4de/53d9897e/54f7347e/1c886fbf/555232930/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
---

name: Kimberley Boggus
subject: Thank you Rep. Slotkin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
The momentum keeps building, crew! We told you about Congresswoman Luria's endorsement a couple of weeks ago, and we're back again with more. Congresswoman Elissa Slotkin (D-MI) also endorsed Admira
|
---
| |
---

| | The momentum keeps building, crew! We told you about Congresswoman Luria's endorsement a couple of weeks ago, and we're back again with more. **Congresswoman Elissa Slotkin (D-MI) also endorsed Admiral Mike for the US Senate.** [](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24b7/33365068/4a722801/3f8bfb4c/277906618/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q2?refcode=FRA_20200505_em_fr_slotkin_all_img") This is the kind of endorsement that means so much to the Admiral. Congresswoman Slotkin started her career with the CIA, and later worked for the Department of Defense under President Obama. She understands not only what strong, ethical leadership looks like, but she's put it into practice for her constituents. Congresswoman Slotkin co-sponsored HR-1, a bill to protect our elections from foreign influence, increase transparency, and make voting easier for every American. The Admiral looks forward to working with the congresswoman on homeland security and military issues -- two committees that she serves on and two areas where Admiral Mike expects to contribute as Iowa's next senator. _**[But to get him to Washington -- and fighting for issues we care about -- we need to win our election. Can you chip in $5 or $10 today?](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24b7/33365068/4a722801/3f8bfb4d/277906618/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q2?amount=5&refcode=FRA_20200505_em_fr_slotkin_all_l1")**_ _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5 >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24b7/33365068/4a722801/3f8bfb4e/277906618/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q2?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=FRA_20200505_em_fr_slotkin_all_abx5")

name: Survey Team (via VPP)
subject: What's wrong with Obama?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04b7/72412298/4f7ab60f/61049480/2191992017/VEsH/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200505_DonLemon_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200505_DonLemon_U1_X1")

| | WE'RE AT OUR WITS' END. WE'RE AT OUR WITS' END. President Obama keeps getting under Trump's skin... but we (and Don Lemon from CNN) are wondering why?!? Despite being out of office for years, Trump still loves to call-out President Obama for things that happened well-beyond his presidency. He's even continuing to funnell stories with FLAT OUT lies about Obama. _**Just look at what he re-tweeted below over the weekend:**_ [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04b7/72412298/4f7ab60f/61049483/2191992017/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/vpp_em_en_200505_donlemon_u1_x1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200505_DonLemon_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200505_DonLemon_U1_X1") CNN host Don Lemon has had enough with Trump's fixation on Obama! He went viral last weekend with one question: **" What is it about President Obama that really gets under your skin?"** [**So Peter, we want to know, what do you think it is about Obama that gets under Trump 's skin?**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04b7/72412298/4f7ab60f/61049482/2191992017/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/vpp_em_en_200505_donlemon_u1_x1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+So+FirstnameFriends+we+want+to+know+what&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200505_DonLemon_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200505_DonLemon_U1_X1") | | | [SURVEY: Why Does Trump Attack Obama?>>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04b7/72412298/4f7ab60f/61049485/2191992017/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/vpp_em_en_200505_donlemon_u1_x1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+SURVEY+Why+Does+Trump+Attack+Obamagtgt&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200505_DonLemon_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200505_DonLemon_U1_X1")
---
[](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04b7/72412298/4f7ab60f/61049484/2191992017/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/vpp_em_en_200505_donlemon_u1_x1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200505_DonLemon_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200505_DonLemon_U1_X1")
**Lemon gave a laundry list of options as to why President Trump continues to bash Obama and ruin his legacy.[But, as one of our top digital supporters, we created an exclusive "Why does Trump hate Obama?" survey.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04b7/72412298/4f7ab60f/61049487/2191992017/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/vpp_em_en_200505_donlemon_u1_x1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6+-+But+as+one+of+our+top+digital+supporters&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200505_DonLemon_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200505_DonLemon_U1_X1")**
| | [Respond Here>>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04b7/72412298/4f7ab60f/61049486/2191992017/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/vpp_em_en_200505_donlemon_u1_x1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=7+-+Respond+Heregtgt&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200505_DonLemon_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200505_DonLemon_U1_X1")
---
Thanks friends!
\-- the Voter Protection Project

name: David Buskill
subject: Vote by mail for June 2nd primary!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Chuck for Congress, Inc
body:
🗳️ You have until May 21st to return your application... see details inside >>
Fellow Hoosier, We are 28 days away from the June 2nd primary election. Dr. Chuck is running in a crowded primary field, and EVERY vote matters! We need a Doctor in The House. Today, we wanted to make sure you’re aware of the latest changes to the election process this year. You can still vote in-person on Election Day. But to lessen the potential public health risk posed by having large numbers of voters at the polls at once, the rules have been temporarily modified to give EVERY registered Indiana voter the option to vote by mail or vote early in-person. **[If you’re planning to vote by mail, you can visit IN.gov to apply for an absentee ballot](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/16f625eea416bb48/85bdc9399d33b44dc3d6b838967d376c/33363).** **Don’t wait until it’s too late... the deadline to submit your application is 11:59 p.m. on May 21st!** Those who would prefer to vote early in-person should contact their **[county election board](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/16f625eea416bb48/9ce8b230250c8956c3d6b838967d376c/33363)** for details on voting locations and hours. Early voting will begin on May 26th and run through noon on June 1st. While you may prefer to vote in-person on Election Day, please know that most counties will have far fewer polling sites than in the past. This could result in longer lines and waiting times to vote. That’s why we’re strongly encouraging Dr. Chuck’s supporters to take advantage of the opportunity to vote by mail or vote early. _To win this all-important primary election on June 2nd, we need every one of Dr. Chuck’s supporters to make their voice heard!_ Thank you for ALL your support of Dr. Chuck throughout the course of this campaign. He’s eager to go to Congress to work hard for our Hoosier values, make healthcare and the economy a priority and deliver results that put people over politics. Again, **[you can visit IN.gov to apply for your absentee ballot to vote by mail](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/16f625eea416bb48/106a8e6d3b48181fc3d6b838967d376c/33363)**.
To Victory, David Buskill
Campaign Manager
Chuck Dietzen for Congress P.S. If you want to vote by mail, don’t wait to take action... _**t**_ _**he deadline to return your completed application is 11:59 p.m. on May 21st!**_ **[Apply today HERE>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/16f625eea416bb48/cc9c02c281ec71e0c3d6b838967d376c/33363)** | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/16f625eea416bb48/750e6f48f7d17c48c3d6b838967d376c/33363) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/16f625eea416bb48/d34a047fbe716f02c3d6b838967d376c/33363)

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Following up from this morning
body:
Peter,
I wanted to quickly follow up on Governor Huckabee’s email from earlier today.
**#GivingTuesdayNow is underway and we are quickly closing in on our goal of $25,000.**
As you do what you can to help those on the frontlines of this pandemic, we ask you to also help equip at least one or two Christian voters for 2020.
[For just $3.20 we can reach one person -- will you help with an urgent donation right now](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200505apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200505apl01pmnd&n=1)?
Thanks for your support on this important day.
Jason Yates

name: Team Collins
subject: Tell Sara Gideon to get back to work!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
49 days. That is how long it has been since Sara Gideon has adjourned the Maine legislature. While Mainers struggle to access unemployment benefits, Speaker of House Sara Gideon refuses to take action to help. She remains focused on her political campaign, completely ignoring her responsibilities to Mainers.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0MzIwMTUS1&kn=12&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDQ0NjU5MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0MzIwMTUS1&kn=8&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDQ0NjU5MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)[****](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0MzIwMTUS1&kn=14&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDQ0NjU5MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
**_49 days._** That is how long it has been since Sara Gideon has adjourned the Maine legislature.
While Mainers struggle to access unemployment benefits, Speaker of House Sara Gideon refuses to take action to help. She remains focused on her political campaign, completely ignoring her responsibilities to Mainers.
Unanswered phone calls and confusion have taken over Maine's under-resourced unemployment system as a result of the Covid-19 crisis.
And in reaction to unemployed Mainers' desperate economic hour, Speaker of the House Sara Gideon has done absolutely nothing to provide the resources necessary to help our friends and neighbors in need.
[**Sign the petition to tell Sara Gideon to get back to work.
Add your name >>>**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0MzIwMTUS1&kn=6&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDQ0NjU5MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Sara Gideon has had plenty of time for virtual events with her political allies and plenty of time to campaign. But she is totally ignoring her duties to the people of Maine as Speaker of the House.
[**Sign the petition to tell Sara Gideon to get back to work.
Add your name >>>**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0MzIwMTUS1&kn=13&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDQ0NjU5MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Senator Susan Collins has been working tirelessly to help Mainers recover from this pandemic. She crafted bipartisan legislation that has provided billions of dollars in help to small businesses and workers across Maine and our country.
Trying times like these call for real leadership that delivers results for Maine families. Sara has proven to Mainers that she does not have what it takes.
When things got hard, Susan Collins got to work. **Sara Gideon, on the other hand, ignored her job and got on the campaign trail.**
-Team Collins
[SIGN THE PETITION](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0MzIwMTUS1&kn=3&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDQ0NjU5MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Defeat Disinfo
subject: When Trump lies, people die.
body:
Trump doesn’t care about death tolls. Just political polls. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/DQE/ni0YAA/t.31i/aRd4RCOFQrGXHVpFgGblIA/h0/JNCkEEFZowJokrW2UsHTjnWDm8s9fPBOm3K9t7TFUId-2BjWrqqfrUlr5OgQ-2BFTiELT6QYp4m7Wpa-2FEypK86oXiZ2yHJ5A5igv-2FLEbP7dF47PiN37K1JV7d2gzCeJjwvqnkaKsOpaXcilImB2JPQF7eFjKYUvlYNEZs8OLI2zBtLHXA1ejZALhGyImKsHRB2BwIArkram1-2BVBjWROIS8E0u9vr5LFo3W-2FojdsxpGsozzIkHvF5iUealzs0xYPwgV-2Fq/zZ5l) The story keeps changing, and each lie means that more people will die.

First, President Trump said the coronavirus was no big deal. It would just disappear like a miracle. His projected death toll was lower than the 37,000 who died from the flu last year.

Then he said that it was serious, but it was contained thanks to his favorite cure-all solution of halting foreigners from entering the country. His projected death toll was 50,000 Americans.

Then he told the American people about social distancing, but he said it was voluntary, not necessary — and we definitely didn’t need to buy masks. His projected death toll was 60,000 Americans.

And then, this past weekend, during a Fox News Town Hall at the Lincoln Memorial, he nearly DOUBLED his previous prediction and announced that 100,000 Americans were going to die.

The curious thing about that number, though, is that it keeps going up at each new press conference and interview — but, as high as the number goes, it’s always lower than the projections provided by public health experts.

**[See for yourself! Watch and share this great video from the Daily Show — they didn’t have to do anything other than play back Trump’s own words to highlight how he can’t be trusted.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/DQE/ni0YAA/t.31i/aRd4RCOFQrGXHVpFgGblIA/h1/Nejq3qQQ6Jn1R8HM5bnp8LbS3uo1-2BN0t5mBIwfpIi5JfbDXiOVFJar6tfT8Q7U7jaY4lApjYib3fgbclZLSdjQPCp6Tp-2F1ZR0MUVFb4qosyk33sTF87ok3j7FUqxwBoyuildBJXFiyYCaxVVBdZdBHhS-2BK-2FaTyokqoRk2vFDnJ34fvINwR7sQFe9Nlt7P1-2Byrqiqqy-2B8mMMkTXamPQYf-2FxEz3cOqLRrisyRWMBHq-2F9WbqR86RdIQcxM-2BMBsVmxq24uHE7Vopea-2BNteW8TOT177vLjxhn48hZ68edeHCwWTo-3D/TMNC)**

[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/DQE/ni0YAA/t.31i/aRd4RCOFQrGXHVpFgGblIA/h2/Nejq3qQQ6Jn1R8HM5bnp8LbS3uo1-2BN0t5mBIwfpIi5JfbDXiOVFJar6tfT8Q7U7jaY4lApjYib3fgbclZLSdjUYGIM2jh-2FWSLlwRpW28Qlt5demdH6E6Jr61R7vAjEO53k78LOJFvbaNCIBvGBgkjK9hp4IOVSQNnnQAfVCy-2BnVMZTcKGRnCq-2F-2B7Ip0TKFGgX8GLdskZ7dK7bmy-2FATnjbjrbpjzqjC1-2FzCXWeD-2BLO1HyPJb1OTVXN5PpXmcWKIGeZE4O-2BxgdnxkUti3HC60u3wy3HyQ-2BEc5NIxldv7umuhQ-3D/o5sa) These different versions of the same story aren’t expressions of Trump’s optimism, nor are they the result of a lack of information. According to the New York Times, his administration is secretly predicting 90,000 deaths per month.

**Trump is telling these lies because he’s afraid of his poll numbers going down.**

That’s not harmless vanity! He’s misleading the American people, many of whom still trust him. When they hear him downplaying the risk, they relax the precautions they’re taking — and they put their own lives at risk.

**[Don’t let that happen! Share this video and make sure that everyone knows that Trump doesn’t really care about how many Americans die. The only number he cares about is how he’s polling for reelection.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/DQE/ni0YAA/t.31i/aRd4RCOFQrGXHVpFgGblIA/h3/Nejq3qQQ6Jn1R8HM5bnp8LbS3uo1-2BN0t5mBIwfpIi5JfbDXiOVFJar6tfT8Q7U7jaY4lApjYib3fgbclZLSdjVRhXVfdDST3qlqwvtNSQeK-2FpyvMSdRiaQpYRz5nLXIRj0NMT7uQ36pYwK956lZviZJvI4-2BYvAJ39YTsl8P3eymVagBoZFj8TvYL2Lw17N3joPwRGbK-2Bks3ZczHFXejAA5-2FxM07d93fbJD9TpU-2BnQV7x6EHgUG9q3jC0knPRbshnR6hGZOU9GdfhHGR1OPq7QPX3GnovpSP2yPRx3KDJbh8-3D/eTj3)**

Thank you for calling Trump out on his lies. You can bet there will be more soon.

The Defeat Disinfo Team

_If you were forwarded this email, you can subscribe to receive these weekly action updates on how to fight Trump's lies[here](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/DQE/ni0YAA/t.31i/aRd4RCOFQrGXHVpFgGblIA/h4/JNCkEEFZowJokrW2UsHTjnWDm8s9fPBOm3K9t7TFUIeWR6YQYMIWUGV-2Bq6xMcuYRwq5c4xdRC-2Fv6D62fe-2F-2BY5aB3B-2BLzQpvamr9OfSq8eUiTvXpXsiHB0XJOAD0CgWJqQttGsLUZmjLM2HWL057Vm1Emp27ojLz6GWpQxLoZlvB2rMjFAlqXvqLn-2Bn5CJli6JNFcnh1W9SbRT0CDr-2FbrXk2NiXE7KXK-2FRt52-2FcYZUn2HrdRd3BWcRaObjXuIx7V4/mz9V)._

To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Defeat Disinfo, please [click here](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/DQE/ni0YAA/t.31i/aRd4RCOFQrGXHVpFgGblIA/h6/CA0gLXQEKb6jqGkD7RqZib6U1j4NzzRN1XZbVIcI-2BVF1hXkDIXoKSAx9wF6ho0N32dzxZDc0awQq5twstiw0q6C1SODe3F8vCHmsoNZblf1bmVmIesENMjXo-2Fctp4GdMiPjpqx1eavJrNsXdl4b-2FxIDh8MlJiznUwecjMvDevuKdEIekFdwEWQu5Bx31pqFVM3ApnvOvMWxJlxYkq6udXdqaGug67bby-2FFriqkNZcSA-3D/79Ye).

Chris Jacobs

name: Defeat Senator Cornyn
subject: Where special interest tax cuts come from
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Nearly two decades in the Senate, and what has he accomplished?

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900d9/7f51f7bc/4ff1e39e/4ef16d49/2611111398/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900d9/7f51f7bc/4ff1e39e/4ef16d48/2611111398/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200505.2nd__1351__&amount=10")
---
Peter, Sen. Cornyn has spent _nearly two decades_ in Washington putting his special interest donors ahead of Texans. Immediately after the Senate quietly slipped a $170 billion tax cut for wealthy real estate investors along with other priorities for powerful special interests into a coronavirus relief bill -- lobbyists, real estate donors, and corporate PACs poured THOUSANDS into Sen. Cornyn's war chest.

MJ knows that in a system where corporate special interests control who gets elected, the everyday person gets left behind -- that's why she isn't taking a penny from corporate PACs. **[Pitch in to our grassroots campaign to elect MJ to be a senator who will put Texans first.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900d9/7f51f7bc/4ff1e39e/4ef16d48/2611111398/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200505.2nd__1351__&amount=10")**

\-- Team MJ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900d9/7f51f7bc/4ff1e39e/4ef16d48/2611111398/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200505.2nd__1351__&amount=10")**

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900d9/7f51f7bc/4ff1e39e/4ef16d4f/2611111398/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1351&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900d9/7f51f7bc/4ff1e39e/4ef16d4e/2611111398/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: Endorsement Alert (via Team Christy)
subject: Breaking news: Obama just endorsed!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter,

A lot of excitement has happened ever since we embarked on this special election on March 3rd.

But truthfully, this might be one of the most exciting things to happen in this race:

**Christy Smith was just endorsed by former President Barack Obama!**

**[Rush a donation right now to show that you stand with President Obama and Christy Smith>>](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb0d/29776869/a7a67bb/569f0a20/2694905378/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDVfb2JhbWEtczMifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200505_obama-s3")** [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb0d/29776869/a7a67bb/569f0a20/2694905378/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDVfb2JhbWEtczMifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200505_obama-s3") President Obama remains a steadfast leader of the Democratic Party, and his endorsement of Christy shows that he stands with the work she has done and the work she pledges to do in Congress. Here's what President Obama had to say today:

> "Now, more than ever, we need pragmatic, experienced, and effective leaders in Washington. I'm proud to endorse Christy Smith in the May 12 special election for Congress because she has proven herself as a leader in her community."
Both Christy and President Obama understand how important good leadership is during this time of crisis. Christy has also promised to build upon the work that Obama did in his 8 years as president.

**[We are so excited to have this endorsement -- building our momentum with just 7 days left. Help us build on this excitement by chipping in $5 or whatever you can to our campaign today.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb0d/29776869/a7a67bb/569f0a20/2694905378/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDVfb2JhbWEtczMifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200505_obama-s3")**

* * *
Peter --

**Trump just made vicious threats against Post Offices** \-- _including the ones near you in 18326!_
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17390045/192633819/150139865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVmYmM0ZDVhLTNiOGYtZWExMS04NmU5LTAwMTU1ZDAzYjVkZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KV04v9x8ieBsKd55RKCv8wVSQNqX-VAa6HWcOEbNLnY=&emci=0c14b49b-398f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=efbc4d5a-3b8f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4584036)
But that's not the end of it, Peter:

[**Some reports even say that Trump is promising to VETO any future covid-19 relief package for the U.S.P.S., unless it agrees to raise it's prices!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17390046/192633820/150139865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVmYmM0ZDVhLTNiOGYtZWExMS04NmU5LTAwMTU1ZDAzYjVkZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KV04v9x8ieBsKd55RKCv8wVSQNqX-VAa6HWcOEbNLnY=&emci=0c14b49b-398f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=efbc4d5a-3b8f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4584036)

Post Offices are critical for everyone, and especially in rural communities!

Losing them would harm so many working Americans who are trying to:
* Cast a vote-by-mail ballot
* Send gifts and cards to their loved ones
* Receive and return important documents for a fair price!

[**We need a MASSIVE movement to protect the U.S. Postal Service and Post Offices everywhere. That's why we're asking you right now to do the right thing and add your name to this urgent petition before the deadline at 11:59 P.M. >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17390047/192633821/150139865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVmYmM0ZDVhLTNiOGYtZWExMS04NmU5LTAwMTU1ZDAzYjVkZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KV04v9x8ieBsKd55RKCv8wVSQNqX-VAa6HWcOEbNLnY=&emci=0c14b49b-398f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=efbc4d5a-3b8f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4584036)

body:
| [](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4b7a/4bd7760e/5bd0134a/77af3e24/2202607846/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/justice-bradley-comment?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200505_1MC_STD_none_3_bradley-comment&source=314_EM_PT_200505_1MC_STD_none_3_bradley-comment&refcode=314_EM_PT_200505_1MC_STD_none_3_bradley-comment") Where do we even start, team?

Rebecca Bradley, one of the Republican justices on the Wisconsin State Supreme Court, literally compared Governor Tony Evers' stay-at-home order to Japanese internment during WWII.

We can't believe that we have to say this, but: **LISTENING TO SCIENCE IS NOT LIKE A JAPANESE INTERNMENT CAMP.**

[Add your name to denounce Rebecca Bradley's racist and out-of-touch comment.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4b7a/4bd7760e/5bd0134a/77af3e23/2202607846/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/justice-bradley-comment?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+to+denounce+Rebecca+Bradle&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200505_1MC_STD_none_3_bradley-comment&source=314_EM_PT_200505_1MC_STD_none_3_bradley-comment&refcode=314_EM_PT_200505_1MC_STD_none_3_bradley-comment")
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4b7a/4bd7760e/5bd0134a/77af3e22/2202607846/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/justice-bradley-comment?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200505_1MC_STD_none_3_bradley-comment&source=314_EM_PT_200505_1MC_STD_none_3_bradley-comment&refcode=314_EM_PT_200505_1MC_STD_none_3_bradley-comment")
---

This isn't just an insult to those who lived through the internment -- it completely ignores the positive health impact that listening to science has had.

[Justice Bradley owes the people of Wisconsin and internment survivors an apology. If you think that her comment is out-of-line and beneath her office, add your name here->](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4b7a/4bd7760e/5bd0134a/77af3e21/2202607846/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/justice-bradley-comment?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+Justice+Bradley+owes+the+people+of+Wisco&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200505_1MC_STD_none_3_bradley-comment&source=314_EM_PT_200505_1MC_STD_none_3_bradley-comment&refcode=314_EM_PT_200505_1MC_STD_none_3_bradley-comment")

[https://secure.314action.org/page/s/justice-bradley-comment](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4b7a/4bd7760e/5bd0134a/77af3e20/2202607846/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/justice-bradley-comment?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+httpssecure314actionorgpagesjusticebradl&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200505_1MC_STD_none_3_bradley-comment&source=314_EM_PT_200505_1MC_STD_none_3_bradley-comment&refcode=314_EM_PT_200505_1MC_STD_none_3_bradley-comment")

We have to keep speaking out, team. Thanks for joining us.

PPE is made by Hoosiers across the state | | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=478429db6c034443af8be746b430cc45&_e=7q6ETax8VUEeGCi-76oeHYN4o0aAlFwQE8bpAtbRKDZM2Z7Mpm3qCRvdzeBGqKAlbIBHhlHJrQYYGd8_P0Xc9zEzUK8H2ZbdrgFKhtE5h5AUW7EqDL8dmKnabUGB_ucjtQNl0n515essWa69OeVenin55zt_D2dWxXr7wHI0544RfQQ-46giOeguMcnGduOpzb9Bl1pVHWI8vgIztvzQ5CF98FD_JGcAKImLG_UDWqyjy0dQjrydQV0XYhpqa5R5Nm5vvifuY5qmvHXjp-00wlL9C4GP3kkpo6Z0H7GoackTyE1qpO64Nt-Y3wH5g66Rgb-HcfN3f_5Ci0IrjqpquwguHUeTGHf5ly1-3xEO9ciEDbv5PBWR-mJPg12pWD4G) |
---|---|---
Friends,

Last week, Governor Holcomb unveiled his **[Back on Track plan](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=478429db6c034443af8be746b430cc45&_e=7q6ETax8VUEeGCi-76oeHYN4o0aAlFwQE8bpAtbRKDZM2Z7Mpm3qCRvdzeBGqKAlbIBHhlHJrQYYGd8_P0Xc9zEzUK8H2ZbdrgFKhtE5h5AUW7EqDL8dmKnabUGB_ucjtQNl0n515essWa69OeVenin55zt_D2dWxXr7wHI0547AxoBhDIgk5M1uDjyJv8zKwwWXlly1F5v7NcBAlNjr3DP03dWI4tk-0bbwtZ4QvGjMblGTRTrDSotFE50ZNlPujG06WS2pZ_1QXFdszCuBW67DqM6mUELFhXTUA0Hk1bJUUbZJDuwhAGk_n8XF6rxEQ1ZcO5CxPONih4NFxzAWmwFnpUCbH7UZDh-xrFqFqs0v3BCEPClQwCYd_-KW528f)** for a _**phased reopening of Indiana over the next two months.**_ The plan is the most _**data-driven, comprehensive**_ state reopening plan in the country.

Along with announcing the Back on Track plan, the governor also announced the creation of the _**Indiana Small Business PPE Marketplace**_ through the Indiana Economic Development Corporation (IEDC). Today we learned some more about the program.

The marketplace will _**connect small business and nonprofit organizations with PPE so they can safely reopen.**_

To qualify an organization must:

* Be registered to do business in Indiana with the Indiana Secretary of State.
* Employ less than 150 associates.
* Be an organization that must use PPE to reopen and comply with safe workplace requirements.
* _Restaurants, retails stores, personal services and office environments._

_**What’s perhaps most exciting about the new PPE marketplace is that the PPE is made by Hoosiers across the state, it’s sourced by Hoosiers, and now it will be used by Hoosiers as we safely reopen in phases.**_

The marketplace will provide PPE in bundles, which will include masks, hand sanitizer and face shields. Currently, the marketplace will fulfill 10,000 requests for PPE bundles – and that number will rise as supplies are replenished.

To date the _**IEDC has procured over 9 million pieces of PPE.**_ Initially, there will be _**no charge**_ for the bundles to qualifying organizations. However, businesses should continue to try and source PPE through traditional supply chains. The new _**state PPE marketplace is designed as a backup option.**_

Just like we told you yesterday about increased testing – making sure our Hoosier small businesses have access to the supplies they need when they’re ready to restart operations is another important step as we enter Phase 2 of the **[Back on Track plan](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=478429db6c034443af8be746b430cc45&_e=7q6ETax8VUEeGCi-76oeHYN4o0aAlFwQE8bpAtbRKDZM2Z7Mpm3qCRvdzeBGqKAlbIBHhlHJrQYYGd8_P0Xc9zEzUK8H2ZbdrgFKhtE5h5AUW7EqDL8dmKnabUGB_ucjtQNl0n515essWa69OeVenin55zt_D2dWxXr7wHI0545F67vIh-MigA5Gh22fIVmVDIH8XyoKioa2BzetMgKNlul223qIPH3vpmFNrJAE3yin6aWZ8MqJLgfm3NcWL8NufxUxWDMrMbq-AxYuUu0vgFPP6EzwYx_j0yonnoHuE2fCC8_tSBpbKyj1gWrhPhofGgdyjs81dFYHTsDGyecrXrKFaxqb8fKIRazCD-HTyLhqtvs9rodspyszQ9ISJ_zd)**. _**It’s all about making sure we’re opening in a safe, measured way, and this marketplace is another tool that will be protecting our fellow Hoosiers across the state.**_

#BackonTrack,
-Your Holcomb Crew
---

name: Blue Georgia
subject: Stacey Abrams is in - are you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
She's waiting on your response, friend

| | |
---
Team, we wanted to make sure you didn't miss this AMAZING news: **Stacey Abrams - Democratic powerhouse and former candidate for governor of Georgia - has endorsed Reverend Raphael Warnock's (D) campaign for Senate!**
_"For the past 15 years, I have watched Reverend Warnock lead on issues of social justice, economic access and voting rights ... I know without a doubt that he will be a strong advocate for folks in every corner of our state."_ - Stacey Abrams
**Team, Stacey needs to know if you 're with her in the fight to build a better, more just America. [_If you agree it 's urgent that we flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats, will you please click here to make your voice heard?_](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-stand-with-stacey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk202-su-nd")**
Stacey's historic run for governor was rooted in the belief that poverty is immoral, that the economy ought to work for everyone and that all Georgians deserve a voice in their government. The strength of her grassroots movement proved that Georgia is winnable and ready for change.
But the Republicans' systematic voter suppression stripped tens of thousands of people of their right to vote - and history will repeat itself unless we elect a leader who's committed to representing all Georgians, not just a lucky few.
That's why Stacey is ALL IN to elect Reverend Warnock, flip Georgia blue and restore moral leadership to Washington. She knows Democrats can - and must - win in Georgia to take back the Senate, and she knows that Reverend Warnock is the one to do it.
**But she needs to know where you stand,** **friend****. We need to hear from another 36 grassroots supporters in Alpharetta before our midnight deadline, but we 're still missing your response. Please, tell us now:**
| | **Do you stand with Stacey Abrams in this fight to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate? **
---
**Deadline: 11:59 p.m. tonight**
---
| | | [YES](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-stand-with-stacey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk202-su-nd")
